authors_text: Xiaohan Zhang,Xingyu Li,Waqas Sultani,Yi Zhou,Safwan Wshah
title: Cross-view Geo-localization via Learning Disentangled Geometric Layout Correspondence
title_zh: 通过学习解开的几何布局对应进行跨视图地理定位
abstract: Cross-view geo-localization aims to estimate the location of a query ground image by matching it to a reference geo-tagged aerial images database. As an extremely challenging task, its difficulties root in the drastic view changes and different capturing time between two views. Despite these difficulties, recent works achieve outstanding progress on cross-view geo-localization benchmarks. However, existing methods still suffer from poor performance on the cross-area benchmarks, in which the training and testing data are captured from two different regions. We attribute this deficiency to the lack of ability to extract the spatial configuration of visual feature layouts and models' overfitting on low-level details from the training set. In this paper, we propose GeoDTR which explicitly disentangles geometric information from raw features and learns the spatial correlations among visual features from aerial and ground pairs with a novel geometric layout extractor module. This module generates a set of geometric layout descriptors, modulating the raw features and producing high-quality latent representations. In addition, we elaborate on two categories of data augmentations, (i) Layout simulation, which varies the spatial configuration while keeping the low-level details intact. (ii) Semantic augmentation, which alters the low-level details and encourages the model to capture spatial configurations. These augmentations help to improve the performance of the cross-view geo-localization models, especially on the cross-area benchmarks. Moreover, we propose a counterfactual-based learning process to benefit the geometric layout extractor in exploring spatial information. Extensive experiments show that GeoDTR not only achieves state-of-the-art results but also significantly boosts the performance on same-area and cross-area benchmarks.

We attribute this deficiency to the lack of ability to extract the spatial configuration of visual feature layouts and models' overfitting on low-level details from the training set. In this paper, we propose GeoDTR which explicitly disentangles geometric information from raw features and learns the spatial correlations among visual features from aerial and ground pairs with a novel geometric layout extractor module. This module generates a set of geometric layout descriptors, modulating the raw features and producing high-quality latent representations. In addition, we elaborate on two categories of data augmentations, (i) Layout simulation, which varies the spatial configuration while keeping the low-level details intact. (ii) Semantic augmentation, which alters the low-level details and encourages the model to capture spatial configurations. These augmentations help to improve the performance of the cross-view geo-localization models, especially on the cross-area benchmarks. Moreover, we propose a counterfactual-based learning process to benefit the geometric layout extractor in exploring spatial information. Extensive experiments show that GeoDTR not only achieves state-of-the-art results but also significantly boosts the performance on same-area and cross-area benchmarks.
abstract_zh: Cross-view geo-localization aims to estimate the location of a query ground image by matching it to a reference geo-tagged aerial images database.作为一项极具挑战性的任务，其困难根源在于视图的剧烈变化以及两个视图之间不同的捕获时间。尽管存在这些困难，最近的工作在跨视图地理定位基准方面取得了显着进展。 However, existing methods still suffer from poor performance on the cross-area benchmarks, in which the training and testing data are captured from two different regions.我们将这种缺陷归因于缺乏提取视觉特征布局的空间配置的能力以及模型对训练集中低级细节的过度拟合。在本文中，我们提出了 GeoDTR，它明确地从原始特征中分离出几何信息，并通过新颖的几何布局提取器模块从空中和地面对中学习视觉特征之间的空间相关性。该模块生成一组几何布局描述符，调制原始特征并生成高质量的潜在表示。此外，我们详细阐述了两类数据增强，（i）布局模拟，它改变空间配置，同时保持低级细节完整。 (ii) 语义增强，它改变低级细节并鼓励模型捕获空间配置。这些增强有助于提高跨视图地理定位模型的性能，特别是在跨区域基准测试上。此外，我们提出了一种基于反事实的学习过程，以有利于几何布局提取器探索空间信息。大量实验表明，GeoDTR 不仅取得了最先进的结果，而且还显着提升了同区域和跨区域基准测试的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨视角地理定位方法GeoDTR，通过解耦几何信息并学习视觉特征的空间关联性，提升跨区域基准测试的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨区域基准测试中表现不佳，主要因模型过度拟合训练集的低级细节，且无法有效提取视觉特征的空间配置信息。
AI.method: 设计几何布局提取模块分离几何信息，结合布局模拟和语义增强两种数据增强策略，并引入反事实学习过程优化空间信息探索。
AI.result: GeoDTR在相同区域和跨区域基准测试中均达到最先进水平，显著提升跨区域定位准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦几何布局与特征表示并结合增强策略，GeoDTR有效解决了跨区域地理定位中的空间配置建模难题。

authors_text: Xiaotian Zhang,Yanjun Zheng,Hang Yan,Xipeng Qiu
title: Investigating Glyph Phonetic Information for Chinese Spell Checking: What Works and What's Next
title_zh: 研究用于中文拼写检查的字形语音信息：什么有效以及下一步是什么
abstract: While pre-trained Chinese language models have demonstrated impressive performance on a wide range of NLP tasks, the Chinese Spell Checking (CSC) task remains a challenge. Previous research has explored using information such as glyphs and phonetics to improve the ability to distinguish misspelled characters, with good results. However, the generalization ability of these models is not well understood: it is unclear whether they incorporate glyph-phonetic information and, if so, whether this information is fully utilized. In this paper, we aim to better understand the role of glyph-phonetic information in the CSC task and suggest directions for improvement. Additionally, we propose a new, more challenging, and practical setting for testing the generalizability of CSC models. All code is made publicly available.
summary: While pre-trained Chinese language models have demonstrated impressive performance on a wide range of NLP tasks, the Chinese Spell Checking (CSC) task remains a challenge. Previous research has explored using information such as glyphs and phonetics to improve the ability to distinguish misspelled characters, with good results. However, the generalization ability of these models is not well understood: it is unclear whether they incorporate glyph-phonetic information and, if so, whether this information is fully utilized. In this paper, we aim to better understand the role of glyph-phonetic information in the CSC task and suggest directions for improvement. Additionally, we propose a new, more challenging, and practical setting for testing the generalizability of CSC models. All code is made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 虽然预训练的中文模型在各种 NLP 任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，但中文拼写检查 (CSC) 任务仍然是一个挑战。此前的研究已经探索利用字形和语音等信息来提高区分拼写错误字符的能力，并取得了良好的效果。然而，这些模型的泛化能力尚不清楚：尚不清楚它们是否包含字形语音信息，如果包含，这些信息是否得到充分利用。在本文中，我们的目标是更好地理解字形语音信息在 CSC 任务中的作用，并提出改进方向。此外，我们提出了一个新的、更具挑战性的、实用的设置来测试 CSC 模型的普遍性。所有代码均公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究汉字字形与语音信息在中文拼写检查中的作用，探索现有模型对此类信息的利用情况，并提出新的测试设置以评估模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究利用字形和语音信息提升中文拼写检查效果，但现有模型对这些信息的利用程度及泛化能力尚不明确，需进一步探究以指导未来改进方向。
AI.method: 通过设计新的测试场景，分析现有模型对字形语音信息的利用情况，并评估其泛化能力，同时提出改进方向。
AI.result: 实验结果揭示了现有模型在利用字形语音信息上的局限性，并验证了新测试设置的有效性，为后续研究提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 研究明确了字形语音信息在CSC中的关键作用，指出现有模型的不足，并通过新测试设置推动更鲁棒的模型发展。

authors_text: Xinyan Liu,Guorong Li,Yuankai Qi,Zhenjun Han,Qingming Huang,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Nicu Sebe
title: Consistency-Aware Anchor Pyramid Network for Crowd Localization
title_zh: 用于人群定位的一致性感知锚金字塔网络
abstract: Crowd localization aims to predict the spatial position of humans in a crowd scenario. We observe that the performance of existing methods is challenged from two aspects: (i) ranking inconsistency between test and training phases; and (ii) fixed anchor resolution may underfit or overfit crowd densities of local regions. To address these problems, we design a supervision target reassignment strategy for training to reduce ranking inconsistency and propose an anchor pyramid scheme to adaptively determine the anchor density in each image region. Extensive experimental results on three widely adopted datasets (ShanghaiTech A\&B, JHU-CROWD++, UCF-QNRF) demonstrate the favorable performance against several state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Crowd localization aims to predict the spatial position of humans in a crowd scenario. We observe that the performance of existing methods is challenged from two aspects: (i) ranking inconsistency between test and training phases; and (ii) fixed anchor resolution may underfit or overfit crowd densities of local regions. To address these problems, we design a supervision target reassignment strategy for training to reduce ranking inconsistency and propose an anchor pyramid scheme to adaptively determine the anchor density in each image region. Extensive experimental results on three widely adopted datasets (ShanghaiTech A\&B, JHU-CROWD++, UCF-QNRF) demonstrate the favorable performance against several state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 人群定位旨在预测人群场景中人类的空间位置。我们观察到现有方法的性能受到两个方面的挑战：（i）测试和训练阶段之间的排名不一致； (ii)固定锚点分辨率可能不适合或过度适合局部区域的人群密度。为了解决这些问题，我们设计了一种用于训练的监督目标重新分配策略，以减少排名不一致，并提出了一种锚金字塔方案来自适应确定每个图像区域中的锚密度。在三个广泛采用的数据集（ShanghaiTech A\&B、JHU-CROWD++、UCF-QNRF）上进行的大量实验结果证明了与几种最先进的方法相比的良好性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种一致性感知的锚点金字塔网络，用于解决人群定位中的排名不一致和锚点密度适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在测试与训练阶段存在排名不一致，且固定锚点分辨率难以适应局部人群密度变化，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计监督目标重分配策略以减少排名不一致，并引入锚点金字塔结构自适应调整图像区域的锚点密度。
AI.result: 在ShanghaiTech A&B、JHU-CROWD++、UCF-QNRF三个数据集上，优于多种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了排名不一致和锚点密度适配问题，在多个基准数据集上验证了优越性。

search_text: Consistency-Aware Anchor Pyramid Network for Crowd Localization 用于人群定位的一致性感知锚金字塔网络 Crowd localization aims to predict the spatial position of humans in a crowd scenario. We observe that the performance of existing methods is challenged from two aspects: (i) ranking inconsistency between test and training phases; and (ii) fixed anchor resolution may underfit or overfit crowd densities of local regions. To address these problems, we design a supervision target reassignment strategy for training to reduce ranking inconsistency and propose an anchor pyramid scheme to adaptively determine the anchor density in each image region. Extensive experimental results on three widely adopted datasets (ShanghaiTech A\&B, JHU-CROWD++, UCF-QNRF) demonstrate the favorable performance against several state-of-the-art methods. 人群定位旨在预测人群场景中人类的空间位置。我们观察到现有方法的性能受到两个方面的挑战：（i）测试和训练阶段之间的排名不一致； (ii)固定锚点分辨率可能不适合或过度适合局部区域的人群密度。为了解决这些问题，我们设计了一种用于训练的监督目标重新分配策略，以减少排名不一致，并提出了一种锚金字塔方案来自适应确定每个图像区域中的锚密度。在三个广泛采用的数据集（ShanghaiTech A\&B、JHU-CROWD++、UCF-QNRF）上进行的大量实验结果证明了与几种最先进的方法相比的良好性能。 本文提出一种一致性感知的锚点金字塔网络，用于解决人群定位中的排名不一致和锚点密度适应问题。 Xinyan Liu,Guorong Li,Yuankai Qi,Zhenjun Han,Qingming Huang,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Nicu Sebe cs.CV

authors_text: Jiafu Wei,Ding Xia,Haoran Xie,Chia-Ming Chang,Chuntao Li,Xi Yang
title: SpaceEditing: Integrating Human Knowledge into Deep Neural Networks via Interactive Latent Space Editing
title_zh: 空间编辑：通过交互式潜在空间编辑将人类知识整合到深层神经网络中
comment: 13 pages, 12 figures, Video URL: https://youtu.be/UTxji6_fs5I
comments: 13 pages, 12 figures, Video URL: https://youtu.be/UTxji6_fs5I
abstract: We propose an interactive editing method that allows humans to help deep neural networks (DNNs) learn a latent space more consistent with human knowledge, thereby improving classification accuracy on indistinguishable ambiguous data. Firstly, we visualize high-dimensional data features through dimensionality reduction methods and design an interactive system \textit{SpaceEditing} to display the visualized data. \textit{SpaceEditing} provides a 2D workspace based on the idea of spatial layout. In this workspace, the user can move the projection data in it according to the system guidance. Then, \textit{SpaceEditing} will find the corresponding high-dimensional features according to the projection data moved by the user, and feed the high-dimensional features back to the network for retraining, therefore achieving the purpose of interactively modifying the high-dimensional latent space for the user. Secondly, to more rationally incorporate human knowledge into the training process of neural networks, we design a new loss function that enables the network to learn user-modified information. Finally, We demonstrate how \textit{SpaceEditing} meets user needs through three case studies while evaluating our proposed new method, and the results confirm the effectiveness of our method.
summary: We propose an interactive editing method that allows humans to help deep neural networks (DNNs) learn a latent space more consistent with human knowledge, thereby improving classification accuracy on indistinguishable ambiguous data. Firstly, we visualize high-dimensional data features through dimensionality reduction methods and design an interactive system \textit{SpaceEditing} to display the visualized data. \textit{SpaceEditing} provides a 2D workspace based on the idea of spatial layout. In this workspace, the user can move the projection data in it according to the system guidance. Then, \textit{SpaceEditing} will find the corresponding high-dimensional features according to the projection data moved by the user, and feed the high-dimensional features back to the network for retraining, therefore achieving the purpose of interactively modifying the high-dimensional latent space for the user. Secondly, to more rationally incorporate human knowledge into the training process of neural networks, we design a new loss function that enables the network to learn user-modified information. Finally, We demonstrate how \textit{SpaceEditing} meets user needs through three case studies while evaluating our proposed new method, and the results confirm the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种交互式编辑方法，允许人类帮助深度神经网络（DNN）学习与人类知识更一致的潜在空间，从而提高对难以区分的模糊数据的分类准确性。首先，我们通过降维方法可视化高维数据特征，并设计一个交互式系统\textit{SpaceEditing}来显示可视化数据。 \textit{SpaceEditing} 提供基于空间布局思想的 2D 工作空间。在该工作空间中，用户可以根据系统引导移动其中的投影数据。然后，\textit{SpaceEditing}会根据用户移动的投影数据找到相应的高维特征，并将高维特征反馈给网络进行重新训练，从而达到为用户交互式修改高维潜在空间的目的。其次，为了更合理地将人类知识融入到神经网络的训练过程中，我们设计了一种新的损失函数，使网络能够学习用户修改的信息。最后，我们通过三个案例研究展示了 \textit{SpaceEditing} 如何满足用户需求，同时评估我们提出的新方法，结果证实了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式编辑方法SpaceEditing，通过人类干预优化深度神经网络的潜在空间，提升对模糊数据的分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在处理具有人类常识的模糊数据时表现不足，需引入人类知识指导潜在空间学习以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过降维可视化高维数据，构建交互系统SpaceEditing允许用户在2D空间调整投影数据，映射回高维特征并反馈至网络重训练，同时设计新损失函数整合用户修改信息。
AI.result: 三个案例研究验证了SpaceEditing的有效性，实验结果表明该方法能显著提升分类准确率并满足用户需求。
AI.conclusion: SpaceEditing通过人类交互式编辑潜在空间，成功将先验知识融入模型训练，为提升模糊数据分类提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Sibendu Paul,Kunal Rao,Giuseppe Coviello,Murugan Sankaradas,Oliver Po,Y. Charlie Hu,Srimat T. Chakradhar
title: Elixir: A system to enhance data quality for multiple analytics on a video stream
title_zh: Elixir：提高视频流多重分析数据质量的系统
abstract: IoT sensors, especially video cameras, are ubiquitously deployed around the world to perform a variety of computer vision tasks in several verticals including retail, healthcare, safety and security, transportation, manufacturing, etc. To amortize their high deployment effort and cost, it is desirable to perform multiple video analytics tasks, which we refer to as Analytical Units (AUs), off the video feed coming out of every camera. In this paper, we first show that in a multi-AU setting, changing the camera setting has disproportionate impact on different AUs performance. In particular, the optimal setting for one AU may severely degrade the performance for another AU, and further the impact on different AUs varies as the environmental condition changes. We then present Elixir, a system to enhance the video stream quality for multiple analytics on a video stream. Elixir leverages Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning (MORL), where the RL agent caters to the objectives from different AUs and adjusts the camera setting to simultaneously enhance the performance of all AUs. To define the multiple objectives in MORL, we develop new AU-specific quality estimator values for each individual AU. We evaluate Elixir through real-world experiments on a testbed with three cameras deployed next to each other (overlooking a large enterprise parking lot) running Elixir and two baseline approaches, respectively. Elixir correctly detects 7.1% (22,068) and 5.0% (15,731) more cars, 94% (551) and 72% (478) more faces, and 670.4% (4975) and 158.6% (3507) more persons than the default-setting and time-sharing approaches, respectively. It also detects 115 license plates, far more than the time-sharing approach (7) and the default setting (0).
summary: IoT sensors, especially video cameras, are ubiquitously deployed around the world to perform a variety of computer vision tasks in several verticals including retail, healthcare, safety and security, transportation, manufacturing, etc. To amortize their high deployment effort and cost, it is desirable to perform multiple video analytics tasks, which we refer to as Analytical Units (AUs), off the video feed coming out of every camera. In this paper, we first show that in a multi-AU setting, changing the camera setting has disproportionate impact on different AUs performance. In particular, the optimal setting for one AU may severely degrade the performance for another AU, and further the impact on different AUs varies as the environmental condition changes. We then present Elixir, a system to enhance the video stream quality for multiple analytics on a video stream. Elixir leverages Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning (MORL), where the RL agent caters to the objectives from different AUs and adjusts the camera setting to simultaneously enhance the performance of all AUs. To define the multiple objectives in MORL, we develop new AU-specific quality estimator values for each individual AU. We evaluate Elixir through real-world experiments on a testbed with three cameras deployed next to each other (overlooking a large enterprise parking lot) running Elixir and two baseline approaches, respectively. Elixir correctly detects 7.1% (22,068) and 5.0% (15,731) more cars, 94% (551) and 72% (478) more faces, and 670.4% (4975) and 158.6% (3507) more persons than the default-setting and time-sharing approaches, respectively. It also detects 115 license plates, far more than the time-sharing approach (7) and the default setting (0).
abstract_zh: 物联网传感器（尤其是摄像机）在世界各地普遍部署，用于在多个垂直领域执行各种计算机视觉任务，包括零售、医疗保健、安全与安保、运输、制造等。为了分摊其高昂的部署工作量和成本，需要在每个摄像机发出的视频源之外执行多个视频分析任务，我们将其称为分析单元 (AU)。在本文中，我们首先表明，在多 AU 设置中，更改相机设置对不同 AU 的性能产生不成比例的影响。特别是，一个AU的最佳设置可能会严重降低另一个AU的性能，并且随着环境条件的变化，对不同AU的影响也不同。然后，我们介绍 Elixir，这是一个增强视频流质量以进行视频流多重分析的系统。 Elixir 利用多目标强化学习 (MORL)，其中 RL 代理迎合不同 AU 的目标，并调整相机设置以同时增强所有 AU 的性能。为了定义 MORL 中的多个目标，我们为每个单独的 AU 开发了新的特定于 AU 的质量估计值。我们通过在测试台上进行的真实实验来评估 Elixir，测试台上部署了三个彼此相邻的摄像头（俯瞰大型企业停车场），分别运行 Elixir 和两种基线方法。与默认设置和分时方法相比，Elixir 正确检测到的汽车分别多了 7.1% (22,068) 和 5.0% (15,731)，人脸多了 94% (551) 和 72% (478)，人多了 670.4% (4975) 和 158.6% (3507)。它还检测 115 个车牌，远远超过分时方法 (7) 和默认设置 (0)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Elixir系统，利用多目标强化学习优化视频流的多任务分析质量。
AI.motivation: 现有摄像头设置难以同时满足多种视频分析任务需求，单一优化方案会导致其他任务性能显著下降。
AI.method: 基于多目标强化学习框架，为每个分析单元设计专用质量评估指标，动态调整摄像头参数以平衡多任务性能。
AI.result: 实验显示Elixir相比基准方法分别提升7.1%/5.0%车辆检测、94%/72%人脸检测、670.4%/158.6%人员检测，且检测到115个车牌（基准仅7个）。
AI.conclusion: Elixir通过多目标强化学习有效协调多任务需求，在实际场景中显著优于传统设置和时分复用方法。

conclusion: Elixir通过多目标强化学习有效协调多任务需求，在实际场景中显著优于传统设置和时分复用方法。
search_text: Elixir: A system to enhance data quality for multiple analytics on a video stream Elixir：提高视频流多重分析数据质量的系统 IoT sensors, especially video cameras, are ubiquitously deployed around the world to perform a variety of computer vision tasks in several verticals including retail, healthcare, safety and security, transportation, manufacturing, etc. To amortize their high deployment effort and cost, it is desirable to perform multiple video analytics tasks, which we refer to as Analytical Units (AUs), off the video feed coming out of every camera. In this paper, we first show that in a multi-AU setting, changing the camera setting has disproportionate impact on different AUs performance. In particular, the optimal setting for one AU may severely degrade the performance for another AU, and further the impact on different AUs varies as the environmental condition changes. We then present Elixir, a system to enhance the video stream quality for multiple analytics on a video stream. Elixir leverages Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning (MORL), where the RL agent caters to the objectives from different AUs and adjusts the camera setting to simultaneously enhance the performance of all AUs. To define the multiple objectives in MORL, we develop new AU-specific quality estimator values for each individual AU. We evaluate Elixir through real-world experiments on a testbed with three cameras deployed next to each other (overlooking a large enterprise parking lot) running Elixir and two baseline approaches, respectively. Elixir correctly detects 7.1% (22,068) and 5.0% (15,731) more cars, 94% (551) and 72% (478) more faces, and 670.4% (4975) and 158.6% (3507) more persons than the default-setting and time-sharing approaches, respectively. It also detects 115 license plates, far more than the time-sharing approach (7) and the default setting (0). 物联网传感器（尤其是摄像机）在世界各地普遍部署，用于在多个垂直领域执行各种计算机视觉任务，包括零售、医疗保健、安全与安保、运输、制造等。为了分摊其高昂的部署工作量和成本，需要在每个摄像机发出的视频源之外执行多个视频分析任务，我们将其称为分析单元 (AU)。在本文中，我们首先表明，在多 AU 设置中，更改相机设置对不同 AU 的性能产生不成比例的影响。特别是，一个AU的最佳设置可能会严重降低另一个AU的性能，并且随着环境条件的变化，对不同AU的影响也不同。然后，我们介绍 Elixir，这是一个增强视频流质量以进行视频流多重分析的系统。 Elixir 利用多目标强化学习 (MORL)，其中 RL 代理迎合不同 AU 的目标，并调整相机设置以同时增强所有 AU 的性能。为了定义 MORL 中的多个目标，我们为每个单独的 AU 开发了新的特定于 AU 的质量估计值。我们通过在测试台上进行的真实实验来评估 Elixir，测试台上部署了三个彼此相邻的摄像头（俯瞰大型企业停车场），分别运行 Elixir 和两种基线方法。与默认设置和分时方法相比，Elixir 正确检测到的汽车分别多了 7.1% (22,068) 和 5.0% (15,731)，人脸多了 94% (551) 和 72% (478)，人多了 670.4% (4975) 和 158.6% (3507)。它还检测 115 个车牌，远远超过分时方法 (7) 和默认设置 (0)。 本文提出Elixir系统，利用多目标强化学习优化视频流的多任务分析质量。 Sibendu Paul,Kunal Rao,Giuseppe Coviello,Murugan Sankaradas,Oliver Po,Y. Charlie Hu,Srimat T. Chakradhar cs.CV,cs.MA

authors_text: Zhendong Liu,Wenyu Jiang,Min guo,Chongjun Wang
title: MixBoost: Improving the Robustness of Deep Neural Networks by Boosting Data Augmentation
title_zh: MixBoost：通过增强数据增强来提高深度神经网络的鲁棒性
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures
abstract: As more and more artificial intelligence (AI) technologies move from the laboratory to real-world applications, the open-set and robustness challenges brought by data from the real world have received increasing attention. Data augmentation is a widely used method to improve model performance, and some recent works have also confirmed its positive effect on the robustness of AI models. However, most of the existing data augmentation methods are heuristic, lacking the exploration of their internal mechanisms. We apply the explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) method, explore the internal mechanisms of popular data augmentation methods, analyze the relationship between game interactions and some widely used robustness metrics, and propose a new proxy for model robustness in the open-set environment. Based on the analysis of the internal mechanisms, we develop a mask-based boosting method for data augmentation that comprehensively improves several robustness measures of AI models and beats state-of-the-art data augmentation approaches. Experiments show that our method can be widely applied to many popular data augmentation methods. Different from the adversarial training, our boosting method not only significantly improves the robustness of models, but also improves the accuracy of test sets. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Anonymous_for_submission}.
summary: As more and more artificial intelligence (AI) technologies move from the laboratory to real-world applications, the open-set and robustness challenges brought by data from the real world have received increasing attention. Data augmentation is a widely used method to improve model performance, and some recent works have also confirmed its positive effect on the robustness of AI models. However, most of the existing data augmentation methods are heuristic, lacking the exploration of their internal mechanisms. We apply the explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) method, explore the internal mechanisms of popular data augmentation methods, analyze the relationship between game interactions and some widely used robustness metrics, and propose a new proxy for model robustness in the open-set environment. Based on the analysis of the internal mechanisms, we develop a mask-based boosting method for data augmentation that comprehensively improves several robustness measures of AI models and beats state-of-the-art data augmentation approaches. Experiments show that our method can be widely applied to many popular data augmentation methods. Different from the adversarial training, our boosting method not only significantly improves the robustness of models, but also improves the accuracy of test sets. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Anonymous_for_submission}.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的人工智能（AI）技术从实验室走向现实应用，现实世界数据带来的开放集和鲁棒性挑战越来越受到关注。数据增强是一种广泛使用的提高模型性能的方法，最近的一些工作也证实了它对人工智能模型的鲁棒性的积极作用。然而，现有的数据增强方法大多是启发式的，缺乏对其内部机制的探索。我们应用可解释人工智能（XAI）方法，探索流行数据增强方法的内部机制，分析游戏交互和一些广泛使用的鲁棒性指标之间的关系，并提出开放集环境中模型鲁棒性的新代理。基于对内部机制的分析，我们开发了一种基于掩模的数据增强增强方法，该方法全面改进了人工智能模型的多项稳健性措施，并击败了最先进的数据增强方法。实验表明，我们的方法可以广泛应用于许多流行的数据增强方法。与对抗性训练不同，我们的Boosting方法不仅显着提高了模型的鲁棒性，而且还提高了测试集的准确性。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Anonymous_for_submission} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixBoost方法，通过增强数据增强策略提升深度神经网络在开放环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法多为启发式，缺乏对内部机制的系统研究，难以有效提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合可解释AI方法分析数据增强机制，提出新的鲁棒性代理指标，并设计基于掩码的MixBoost增强框架。
AI.result: 实验表明MixBoost在多个鲁棒性指标上优于现有方法，同时提升测试准确率且适用于多种增强技术。
AI.conclusion: MixBoost通过机制分析与掩码增强协同提升模型鲁棒性，为数据增强研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Xinle Wu,Dalin Zhang,Miao Zhang,Chenjuan Guo,Shuai Zhao,Yi Zhang,Huai Wang,Bin Yang
title: AutoPINN: When AutoML Meets Physics-Informed Neural Networks
title_zh: AutoPINN：当 AutoML 遇到物理信息神经网络
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have recently been proposed to solve scientific and engineering problems, where physical laws are introduced into neural networks as prior knowledge. With the embedded physical laws, PINNs enable the estimation of critical parameters, which are unobservable via physical tools, through observable variables. For example, Power Electronic Converters (PECs) are essential building blocks for the green energy transition. PINNs have been applied to estimate the capacitance, which is unobservable during PEC operations, using current and voltage, which can be observed easily during operations. The estimated capacitance facilitates self-diagnostics of PECs. Existing PINNs are often manually designed, which is time-consuming and may lead to suboptimal performance due to a large number of design choices for neural network architectures and hyperparameters. In addition, PINNs are often deployed on different physical devices, e.g., PECs, with limited and varying resources. Therefore, it requires designing different PINN models under different resource constraints, making it an even more challenging task for manual design. To contend with the challenges, we propose Automated Physics-Informed Neural Networks (AutoPINN), a framework that enables the automated design of PINNs by combining AutoML and PINNs. Specifically, we first tailor a search space that allows finding high-accuracy PINNs for PEC internal parameter estimation. We then propose a resource-aware search strategy to explore the search space to find the best PINN model under different resource constraints. We experimentally demonstrate that AutoPINN is able to find more accurate PINN models than human-designed, state-of-the-art PINN models using fewer resources.
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have recently been proposed to solve scientific and engineering problems, where physical laws are introduced into neural networks as prior knowledge. With the embedded physical laws, PINNs enable the estimation of critical parameters, which are unobservable via physical tools, through observable variables. For example, Power Electronic Converters (PECs) are essential building blocks for the green energy transition. PINNs have been applied to estimate the capacitance, which is unobservable during PEC operations, using current and voltage, which can be observed easily during operations. The estimated capacitance facilitates self-diagnostics of PECs. Existing PINNs are often manually designed, which is time-consuming and may lead to suboptimal performance due to a large number of design choices for neural network architectures and hyperparameters. In addition, PINNs are often deployed on different physical devices, e.g., PECs, with limited and varying resources. Therefore, it requires designing different PINN models under different resource constraints, making it an even more challenging task for manual design. To contend with the challenges, we propose Automated Physics-Informed Neural Networks (AutoPINN), a framework that enables the automated design of PINNs by combining AutoML and PINNs. Specifically, we first tailor a search space that allows finding high-accuracy PINNs for PEC internal parameter estimation. We then propose a resource-aware search strategy to explore the search space to find the best PINN model under different resource constraints. We experimentally demonstrate that AutoPINN is able to find more accurate PINN models than human-designed, state-of-the-art PINN models using fewer resources.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了物理信息神经网络（PINN）来解决科学和工程问题，其中物理定律作为先验知识被引入神经网络。借助嵌入的物理定律，PINN 可以通过可观测变量来估计无法通过物理工具观测到的关键参数。例如，电力电子转换器 (PEC) 是绿色能源转型的重要组成部分。 PINN 已被用于估计在 PEC 操作期间无法观察到的电容，而使用在操作期间可以轻松观察到的电流和电压。估计的电容有助于 PEC 的自我诊断。现有的 PINN 通常是手动设计的，这非常耗时，并且可能由于神经网络架构和超参数的大量设计选择而导致性能不佳。此外，PINN 通常部署在不同的物理设备（例如 PEC）上，资源有限且各不相同。因此，需要在不同的资源约束下设计不同的PINN模型，这使得手动设计变得更具挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了自动化物理信息神经网络 (AutoPINN)，这是一个通过结合 AutoML 和 PINN 来实现 PINN 自动化设计的框架。具体来说，我们首先定制一个搜索空间，允许找到用于 PEC 内部参数估计的高精度 PINN。然后，我们提出一种资源感知搜索策略来探索搜索空间，以找到不同资源约束下的最佳 PINN 模型。我们通过实验证明，与人工设计的最先进的 PINN 模型相比，AutoPINN 能够使用更少的资源找到更准确的 PINN 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoPINN框架，结合AutoML与物理信息神经网络（PINN），实现针对电力电子转换器（PEC）内部参数估计的自动化高效模型设计。
AI.motivation: 传统PINN需人工设计网络结构与超参数，耗时且难以应对不同硬件资源约束，导致性能次优。PEC等场景需在有限资源下精准估计不可观测参数（如电容），亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建针对PINN的定制化搜索空间，并设计资源感知的搜索策略，在保证精度的同时适应不同硬件资源限制，通过AutoML自动优化网络结构与参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，AutoPINN在更少资源下找到比人工设计模型更精确的PINN，验证了其在资源约束环境下的有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: AutoPINN通过融合AutoML与物理约束，实现了高效自动化PINN设计，为资源受限场景下的科学工程问题提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Therefore, it requires designing different PINN models under different resource constraints, making it an even more challenging task for manual design. To contend with the challenges, we propose Automated Physics-Informed Neural Networks (AutoPINN), a framework that enables the automated design of PINNs by combining AutoML and PINNs. Specifically, we first tailor a search space that allows finding high-accuracy PINNs for PEC internal parameter estimation. We then propose a resource-aware search strategy to explore the search space to find the best PINN model under different resource constraints. We experimentally demonstrate that AutoPINN is able to find more accurate PINN models than human-designed, state-of-the-art PINN models using fewer resources. 最近提出了物理信息神经网络（PINN）来解决科学和工程问题，其中物理定律作为先验知识被引入神经网络。借助嵌入的物理定律，PINN 可以通过可观测变量来估计无法通过物理工具观测到的关键参数。例如，电力电子转换器 (PEC) 是绿色能源转型的重要组成部分。 PINN 已被用于估计在 PEC 操作期间无法观察到的电容，而使用在操作期间可以轻松观察到的电流和电压。估计的电容有助于 PEC 的自我诊断。现有的 PINN 通常是手动设计的，这非常耗时，并且可能由于神经网络架构和超参数的大量设计选择而导致性能不佳。此外，PINN 通常部署在不同的物理设备（例如 PEC）上，资源有限且各不相同。因此，需要在不同的资源约束下设计不同的PINN模型，这使得手动设计变得更具挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了自动化物理信息神经网络 (AutoPINN)，这是一个通过结合 AutoML 和 PINN 来实现 PINN 自动化设计的框架。具体来说，我们首先定制一个搜索空间，允许找到用于 PEC 内部参数估计的高精度 PINN。然后，我们提出一种资源感知搜索策略来探索搜索空间，以找到不同资源约束下的最佳 PINN 模型。我们通过实验证明，与人工设计的最先进的 PINN 模型相比，AutoPINN 能够使用更少的资源找到更准确的 PINN 模型。 本文提出AutoPINN框架，结合AutoML与物理信息神经网络（PINN），实现针对电力电子转换器（PEC）内部参数估计的自动化高效模型设计。 Xinle Wu,Dalin Zhang,Miao Zhang,Chenjuan Guo,Shuai Zhao,Yi Zhang,Huai Wang,Bin Yang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hongxin Wei,Huiping Zhuang,Renchunzi Xie,Lei Feng,Gang Niu,Bo An,Yixuan Li
title: Mitigating Memorization of Noisy Labels by Clipping the Model Prediction
title_zh: 通过裁剪模型预测来减轻噪声标签的记忆
comment: Accepted by ICML 2023
comments: Accepted by ICML 2023
abstract: In the presence of noisy labels, designing robust loss functions is critical for securing the generalization performance of deep neural networks. Cross Entropy (CE) loss has been shown to be not robust to noisy labels due to its unboundedness. To alleviate this issue, existing works typically design specialized robust losses with the symmetric condition, which usually lead to the underfitting issue. In this paper, our key idea is to induce a loss bound at the logit level, thus universally enhancing the noise robustness of existing losses. Specifically, we propose logit clipping (LogitClip), which clamps the norm of the logit vector to ensure that it is upper bounded by a constant. In this manner, CE loss equipped with our LogitClip method is effectively bounded, mitigating the overfitting to examples with noisy labels. Moreover, we present theoretical analyses to certify the noise-tolerant ability of LogitClip. Extensive experiments show that LogitClip not only significantly improves the noise robustness of CE loss, but also broadly enhances the generalization performance of popular robust losses.
summary: In the presence of noisy labels, designing robust loss functions is critical for securing the generalization performance of deep neural networks. Cross Entropy (CE) loss has been shown to be not robust to noisy labels due to its unboundedness. To alleviate this issue, existing works typically design specialized robust losses with the symmetric condition, which usually lead to the underfitting issue. In this paper, our key idea is to induce a loss bound at the logit level, thus universally enhancing the noise robustness of existing losses. Specifically, we propose logit clipping (LogitClip), which clamps the norm of the logit vector to ensure that it is upper bounded by a constant. In this manner, CE loss equipped with our LogitClip method is effectively bounded, mitigating the overfitting to examples with noisy labels. Moreover, we present theoretical analyses to certify the noise-tolerant ability of LogitClip. Extensive experiments show that LogitClip not only significantly improves the noise robustness of CE loss, but also broadly enhances the generalization performance of popular robust losses.
abstract_zh: 在存在噪声标签的情况下，设计稳健的损失函数对于确保深度神经网络的泛化性能至关重要。由于其无界性，交叉熵（CE）损失已被证明对噪声标签不具有鲁棒性。为了缓解这个问题，现有的工作通常在对称条件下设计专门的鲁棒损失，这通常会导致欠拟合问题。在本文中，我们的关键思想是在 logit 水平上引入损失界限，从而普遍增强现有损失的噪声鲁棒性。具体来说，我们提出了对数剪裁（LogitClip），它对对数向量的范数进行钳位以确保其上限为常数。通过这种方式，我们的 LogitClip 方法配备的 CE 损失得到有效限制，从而减轻了对带有噪声标签的示例的过度拟合。此外，我们还提出了理论分析来证明 LogitClip 的抗噪声能力。大量实验表明，LogitClip不仅显着提高了CE损失的噪声鲁棒性，而且广泛增强了流行的鲁棒损失的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过裁剪模型logit输出来缓解噪声标签导致的过拟合问题，增强深度神经网络的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 交叉熵损失因无界性易受噪声标签影响，现有鲁棒损失设计常导致欠拟合，需更通用的噪声鲁棒性提升方法。
AI.method: 提出LogitClip方法，在logit层对向量范数进行裁剪限制，使损失函数获得上界约束，并提供理论分析证明其噪声容忍能力。
AI.result: 实验表明LogitClip显著提升CE损失的噪声鲁棒性，同时增强主流鲁棒损失的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: LogitClip通过logit层裁剪有效缓解噪声标签问题，兼具理论保证与广泛适用性。

authors_text: Gaoxiang Cong,Liang Li,Yuankai Qi,Zhengjun Zha,Qi Wu,Wenyu Wang,Bin Jiang,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Qingming Huang
title: Learning to Dub Movies via Hierarchical Prosody Models
title_zh: 通过分层韵律模型学习配音电影
comment: accepted to CVPR 2023
comments: accepted to CVPR 2023
abstract: Given a piece of text, a video clip and a reference audio, the movie dubbing (also known as visual voice clone V2C) task aims to generate speeches that match the speaker's emotion presented in the video using the desired speaker voice as reference. V2C is more challenging than conventional text-to-speech tasks as it additionally requires the generated speech to exactly match the varying emotions and speaking speed presented in the video. Unlike previous works, we propose a novel movie dubbing architecture to tackle these problems via hierarchical prosody modelling, which bridges the visual information to corresponding speech prosody from three aspects: lip, face, and scene. Specifically, we align lip movement to the speech duration, and convey facial expression to speech energy and pitch via attention mechanism based on valence and arousal representations inspired by recent psychology findings. Moreover, we design an emotion booster to capture the atmosphere from global video scenes. All these embeddings together are used to generate mel-spectrogram and then convert to speech waves via existing vocoder. Extensive experimental results on the Chem and V2C benchmark datasets demonstrate the favorable performance of the proposed method. The source code and trained models will be released to the public.
summary: Given a piece of text, a video clip and a reference audio, the movie dubbing (also known as visual voice clone V2C) task aims to generate speeches that match the speaker's emotion presented in the video using the desired speaker voice as reference. V2C is more challenging than conventional text-to-speech tasks as it additionally requires the generated speech to exactly match the varying emotions and speaking speed presented in the video. Unlike previous works, we propose a novel movie dubbing architecture to tackle these problems via hierarchical prosody modelling, which bridges the visual information to corresponding speech prosody from three aspects: lip, face, and scene. Specifically, we align lip movement to the speech duration, and convey facial expression to speech energy and pitch via attention mechanism based on valence and arousal representations inspired by recent psychology findings. Moreover, we design an emotion booster to capture the atmosphere from global video scenes. All these embeddings together are used to generate mel-spectrogram and then convert to speech waves via existing vocoder. Extensive experimental results on the Chem and V2C benchmark datasets demonstrate the favorable performance of the proposed method. The source code and trained models will be released to the public.
abstract_zh: 给定一段文本、一段视频剪辑和一个参考音频，电影配音（也称为视觉语音克隆 V2C）任务旨在使用所需的说话人声音作为参考，生成与视频中说话人的情绪相匹配的语音。 V2C 比传统的文本到语音任务更具挑战性，因为它还要求生成的语音与视频中呈现的不同情绪和语速完全匹配。与之前的工作不同，我们提出了一种新颖的电影配音架构，通过分层韵律建模来解决这些问题，该架构从嘴唇、面部和场景三个方面将视觉信息与相应的语音韵律联系起来。具体来说，我们将嘴唇运动与语音持续时间保持一致，并通过基于受最新心理学发现启发的效价和唤醒表征的注意机制将面部表情传达给语音能量和音调。此外，我们设计了一个情感增强器来捕捉全球视频场景的氛围。所有这些嵌入一起用于生成梅尔频谱图，然后通过现有的声码器转换为语音波。 Chem 和 V2C 基准数据集上的大量实验结果证明了该方法的良好性能。源代码和训练好的模型将向公众发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层韵律建模的电影配音方法，通过结合唇部动作、面部表情和场景信息生成与视频情绪和语速匹配的语音。
AI.motivation: 传统文本到语音任务无法满足电影配音中对动态情绪和语速匹配的需求，现有方法未能有效整合视觉信息与语音韵律的关联。
AI.method: 设计分层模型从唇部运动（对齐语音时长）、面部表情（通过情绪注意力机制控制音能和音高）及场景氛围（情绪增强模块）三个维度建模，最终生成语音波形。
AI.result: 在Chem和V2C基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在语音韵律与视频情绪匹配度上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层韵律建模有效解决了视觉信息到语音生成的跨模态对齐问题，代码和模型已开源。

authors_text: Xin Chen,Biao Jiang,Wen Liu,Zilong Huang,Bin Fu,Tao Chen,Jingyi Yu,Gang Yu
title: Executing your Commands via Motion Diffusion in Latent Space
title_zh: 通过潜在空间中的运动扩散执行命令
comment: 18 pages, 11 figures, conference
comments: 18 pages, 11 figures, conference
abstract: We study a challenging task, conditional human motion generation, which produces plausible human motion sequences according to various conditional inputs, such as action classes or textual descriptors. Since human motions are highly diverse and have a property of quite different distribution from conditional modalities, such as textual descriptors in natural languages, it is hard to learn a probabilistic mapping from the desired conditional modality to the human motion sequences. Besides, the raw motion data from the motion capture system might be redundant in sequences and contain noises; directly modeling the joint distribution over the raw motion sequences and conditional modalities would need a heavy computational overhead and might result in artifacts introduced by the captured noises. To learn a better representation of the various human motion sequences, we first design a powerful Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) and arrive at a representative and low-dimensional latent code for a human motion sequence. Then, instead of using a diffusion model to establish the connections between the raw motion sequences and the conditional inputs, we perform a diffusion process on the motion latent space. Our proposed Motion Latent-based Diffusion model (MLD) could produce vivid motion sequences conforming to the given conditional inputs and substantially reduce the computational overhead in both the training and inference stages. Extensive experiments on various human motion generation tasks demonstrate that our MLD achieves significant improvements over the state-of-the-art methods among extensive human motion generation tasks, with two orders of magnitude faster than previous diffusion models on raw motion sequences.
summary: We study a challenging task, conditional human motion generation, which produces plausible human motion sequences according to various conditional inputs, such as action classes or textual descriptors. Since human motions are highly diverse and have a property of quite different distribution from conditional modalities, such as textual descriptors in natural languages, it is hard to learn a probabilistic mapping from the desired conditional modality to the human motion sequences. Besides, the raw motion data from the motion capture system might be redundant in sequences and contain noises; directly modeling the joint distribution over the raw motion sequences and conditional modalities would need a heavy computational overhead and might result in artifacts introduced by the captured noises. To learn a better representation of the various human motion sequences, we first design a powerful Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) and arrive at a representative and low-dimensional latent code for a human motion sequence. Then, instead of using a diffusion model to establish the connections between the raw motion sequences and the conditional inputs, we perform a diffusion process on the motion latent space. Our proposed Motion Latent-based Diffusion model (MLD) could produce vivid motion sequences conforming to the given conditional inputs and substantially reduce the computational overhead in both the training and inference stages. Extensive experiments on various human motion generation tasks demonstrate that our MLD achieves significant improvements over the state-of-the-art methods among extensive human motion generation tasks, with two orders of magnitude faster than previous diffusion models on raw motion sequences.
abstract_zh: 我们研究一项具有挑战性的任务，即条件人体运动生成，它根据各种条件输入（例如动作类或文本描述符）生成合理的人体运动序列。由于人体运动高度多样化，并且具有与条件模态（例如自然语言中的文本描述符）完全不同的分布特性，因此很难学习从所需条件模态到人体运动序列的概率映射。此外，来自运动捕捉系统的原始运动数据可能存在序列冗余且包含噪声；直接对原始运动序列和条件模态的联合分布进行建模将需要大量的计算开销，并且可能会导致捕获的噪声引入伪影。为了更好地表示各种人体运动序列，我们首先设计了一个强大的变分自动编码器（VAE），并为人体运动序列获得了具有代表性的低维潜在代码。然后，我们不使用扩散模型来建立原始运动序列和条件输入之间的连接，而是对运动潜在空间执行扩散过程。我们提出的基于运动潜伏的扩散模型（MLD）可以产生符合给定条件输入的生动运动序列，并大大减少训练和推理阶段的计算开销。对各种人体运动生成任务的大量实验表明，我们的 MLD 在广泛的人体运动生成任务中比最先进的方法取得了显着改进，比以前的原始运动序列扩散模型快了两个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于条件输入（如动作类别或文本描述）生成合理的人类运动序列的挑战性任务。
AI.motivation: 人类运动高度多样且与条件模态（如文本）分布差异大，直接建模会导致计算开销大且引入噪声伪影。
AI.method: 设计强大的变分自编码器（VAE）提取低维潜在表示，并在潜在空间中进行扩散过程，而非直接处理原始运动数据。
AI.result: 在多种任务中显著优于现有方法，训练和推理速度比原始扩散模型快两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MLD方法通过潜在空间扩散有效解决了人类运动生成的挑战，实现了高效高质量的生成效果。

authors_text: Mengyuan Lee,Guanding Yu,Huaiyu Dai,Geoffrey Ye Li
title: Graph Neural Networks Meet Wireless Communications: Motivation, Applications, and Future Directions
title_zh: 图神经网络遇上无线通信：动机、应用和未来方向
comment: This paper is accepted by IEEE Wirel. Commun
comments: This paper is accepted by IEEE Wirel. Commun
abstract: As an efficient graph analytical tool, graph neural networks (GNNs) have special properties that are particularly fit for the characteristics and requirements of wireless communications, exhibiting good potential for the advancement of next-generation wireless communications. This article aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the interplay between GNNs and wireless communications, including GNNs for wireless communications (GNN4Com) and wireless communications for GNNs (Com4GNN). In particular, we discuss GNN4Com based on how graphical models are constructed and introduce Com4GNN with corresponding incentives. We also highlight potential research directions to promote future research endeavors for GNNs in wireless communications.
summary: As an efficient graph analytical tool, graph neural networks (GNNs) have special properties that are particularly fit for the characteristics and requirements of wireless communications, exhibiting good potential for the advancement of next-generation wireless communications. This article aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the interplay between GNNs and wireless communications, including GNNs for wireless communications (GNN4Com) and wireless communications for GNNs (Com4GNN). In particular, we discuss GNN4Com based on how graphical models are constructed and introduce Com4GNN with corresponding incentives. We also highlight potential research directions to promote future research endeavors for GNNs in wireless communications.
abstract_zh: 作为一种高效的图分析工具，图神经网络（GNN）具有特殊的性质，特别适合无线通信的特点和要求，在下一代无线通信的发展中展现出良好的潜力。本文旨在全面概述 GNN 和无线通信之间的相互作用，包括用于无线通信的 GNN (GNN4Com) 和用于 GNN 的无线通信 (Com4GNN)。特别是，我们基于图模型的构建方式讨论了 GNN4Com，并介绍了具有相应激励措施的 Com4GNN。我们还强调了潜在的研究方向，以促进 GNN 在无线通信领域的未来研究工作。

AI.tldr: 综述图神经网络（GNNs）在无线通信中的应用及未来研究方向，探讨GNN4Com和Com4GNN的相互作用。
AI.motivation: GNNs具有适合无线通信特性的独特性质，有望推动下一代无线通信的发展，但需要系统性综述其应用与挑战。
AI.method: 通过综述现有研究，分析GNN4Com的图模型构建方法，并探讨Com4GNN的激励机制及应用场景。
AI.result: 总结了GNNs在无线通信中的关键应用，识别了当前技术挑战，并提出未来研究方向以促进技术融合。
AI.conclusion: GNNs与无线通信的结合具有广阔前景，未来需在算法优化、跨领域协作及实际部署等方面深入研究。

authors_text: Ryan Marinelli
title: Analysis of Deep Learning Architectures and Efficacy of Detecting Forest Fires
title_zh: 深度学习架构和森林火灾检测效果分析
abstract: The aim of this research is to review the state of computer vision as applied to combatting forest fires. My motivation to research this topic comes from the urgency with which new participants and stakeholders require guidance in this field. One of these new stakeholder groups are practitioners of machine learning that lack domain expertise. Introducing these new entrants to domain specific datasets and methods is critical to supporting this aim as general computer vision datasets are insufficient to support specialized research initiatives. The overarching aim of the research is to introduce datasets and methods to make them more accessible to the community.
summary: The aim of this research is to review the state of computer vision as applied to combatting forest fires. My motivation to research this topic comes from the urgency with which new participants and stakeholders require guidance in this field. One of these new stakeholder groups are practitioners of machine learning that lack domain expertise. Introducing these new entrants to domain specific datasets and methods is critical to supporting this aim as general computer vision datasets are insufficient to support specialized research initiatives. The overarching aim of the research is to introduce datasets and methods to make them more accessible to the community.
abstract_zh: 这项研究的目的是回顾计算机视觉在扑灭森林火灾中的应用状况。我研究这个主题的动机来自于新参与者和利益相关者需要该领域指导的紧迫性。这些新的利益相关者群体之一是缺乏领域专业知识的机器学习从业者。将这些新进入者引入特定领域的数据集和方法对于支持这一目标至关重要，因为通用计算机视觉数据集不足以支持专门的研究计划。该研究的总体目标是引入数据集和方法，使社区更容易获取它们。

AI.tldr: 分析深度学习架构在森林火灾检测中的应用效果，并评估其有效性。
AI.motivation: 由于新参与者和利益相关者（尤其是缺乏领域知识的机器学习实践者）需要指导，因此需要引入特定数据集和方法以支持森林火灾检测的研究。
AI.method: 通过回顾计算机视觉在森林火灾检测中的应用现状，介绍并评估适用于该领域的深度学习架构和数据集。
AI.result: 研究结果包括对现有深度学习方法的评估，并提出了适用于森林火灾检测的特定数据集和方法，以促进社区的研究和应用。
AI.conclusion: 结论强调了针对森林火灾检测的特定数据集和方法的重要性，为机器学习实践者提供支持，并建议进一步研究以优化检测效果。

Introducing these new entrants to domain specific datasets and methods is critical to supporting this aim as general computer vision datasets are insufficient to support specialized research initiatives. The overarching aim of the research is to introduce datasets and methods to make them more accessible to the community. 这项研究的目的是回顾计算机视觉在扑灭森林火灾中的应用状况。我研究这个主题的动机来自于新参与者和利益相关者需要该领域指导的紧迫性。这些新的利益相关者群体之一是缺乏领域专业知识的机器学习从业者。将这些新进入者引入特定领域的数据集和方法对于支持这一目标至关重要，因为通用计算机视觉数据集不足以支持专门的研究计划。该研究的总体目标是引入数据集和方法，使社区更容易获取它们。 分析深度学习架构在森林火灾检测中的应用效果，并评估其有效性。 Ryan Marinelli cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Minyang Jiang,Yongwei Wang,Martin J. McKeown,Z. Jane Wang
title: Occlusion-Robust FAU Recognition by Mining Latent Space of Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: 通过挖掘屏蔽自动编码器的潜在空间进行遮挡鲁棒 FAU 识别
abstract: Facial action units (FAUs) are critical for fine-grained facial expression analysis. Although FAU detection has been actively studied using ideally high quality images, it was not thoroughly studied under heavily occluded conditions. In this paper, we propose the first occlusion-robust FAU recognition method to maintain FAU detection performance under heavy occlusions. Our novel approach takes advantage of rich information from the latent space of masked autoencoder (MAE) and transforms it into FAU features. Bypassing the occlusion reconstruction step, our model efficiently extracts FAU features of occluded faces by mining the latent space of a pretrained masked autoencoder. Both node and edge-level knowledge distillation are also employed to guide our model to find a mapping between latent space vectors and FAU features. Facial occlusion conditions, including random small patches and large blocks, are thoroughly studied. Experimental results on BP4D and DISFA datasets show that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performances under the studied facial occlusion, significantly outperforming existing baseline methods. In particular, even under heavy occlusion, the proposed method can achieve comparable performance as state-of-the-art methods under normal conditions.
summary: Facial action units (FAUs) are critical for fine-grained facial expression analysis. Although FAU detection has been actively studied using ideally high quality images, it was not thoroughly studied under heavily occluded conditions. In this paper, we propose the first occlusion-robust FAU recognition method to maintain FAU detection performance under heavy occlusions. Our novel approach takes advantage of rich information from the latent space of masked autoencoder (MAE) and transforms it into FAU features. Bypassing the occlusion reconstruction step, our model efficiently extracts FAU features of occluded faces by mining the latent space of a pretrained masked autoencoder. Both node and edge-level knowledge distillation are also employed to guide our model to find a mapping between latent space vectors and FAU features. Facial occlusion conditions, including random small patches and large blocks, are thoroughly studied. Experimental results on BP4D and DISFA datasets show that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performances under the studied facial occlusion, significantly outperforming existing baseline methods. In particular, even under heavy occlusion, the proposed method can achieve comparable performance as state-of-the-art methods under normal conditions.
abstract_zh: 面部动作单元 (FAU) 对于细粒度面部表情分析至关重要。尽管人们已经使用理想的高质量图像积极研究了 FAU 检测，但在严重遮挡的条件下尚未进行彻底的研究。在本文中，我们提出了第一个遮挡鲁棒的 FAU 识别方法，以在严重遮挡下保持 FAU 检测性能。我们的新颖方法利用了来自屏蔽自动编码器 (MAE) 潜在空间的丰富信息，并将其转换为 FAU 特征。绕过遮挡重建步骤，我们的模型通过挖掘预训练的掩模自动编码器的潜在空间，有效地提取遮挡面部的 FAU 特征。节点和边缘级知识蒸馏也被用来指导我们的模型找到潜在空间向量和 FAU 特征之间的映射。面部遮挡条件，包括随机小斑块和大块，都经过彻底研究。 BP4D 和 DISFA 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在所研究的面部遮挡下实现最先进的性能，显着优于现有的基线方法。特别是，即使在严重遮挡的情况下，所提出的方法也可以在正常条件下实现与最先进方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码自编码器潜在空间挖掘的遮挡鲁棒面部动作单元（FAU）识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有FAU检测方法在严重遮挡条件下性能下降明显，缺乏针对遮挡场景的鲁棒性研究。
AI.method: 利用预训练掩码自编码器（MAE）的潜在空间信息，通过节点级和边级知识蒸馏学习潜在空间向量与FAU特征的映射关系，无需遮挡重建步骤直接提取遮挡人脸的FAU特征。
AI.result: 在BP4D和DISFA数据集上，该方法在严重遮挡条件下达到SOTA性能，效果接近正常条件下的最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘MAE潜在空间特征，提出的新方法有效解决了遮挡场景下的FAU识别问题，显著优于现有基线方法。

authors_text: Charline Le Lan,Joshua Greaves,Jesse Farebrother,Mark Rowland,Fabian Pedregosa,Rishabh Agarwal,Marc G. Bellemare
title: A Novel Stochastic Gradient Descent Algorithm for Learning Principal Subspaces
title_zh: 一种新的学习主子空间的随机梯度下降算法
comment: 8 pages in main content, 2 pages of bibliography and 5 pages in Appendix
comments: 8 pages in main content, 2 pages of bibliography and 5 pages in Appendix
abstract: Many machine learning problems encode their data as a matrix with a possibly very large number of rows and columns. In several applications like neuroscience, image compression or deep reinforcement learning, the principal subspace of such a matrix provides a useful, low-dimensional representation of individual data. Here, we are interested in determining the $d$-dimensional principal subspace of a given matrix from sample entries, i.e. from small random submatrices. Although a number of sample-based methods exist for this problem (e.g. Oja's rule \citep{oja1982simplified}), these assume access to full columns of the matrix or particular matrix structure such as symmetry and cannot be combined as-is with neural networks \citep{baldi1989neural}. In this paper, we derive an algorithm that learns a principal subspace from sample entries, can be applied when the approximate subspace is represented by a neural network, and hence can be scaled to datasets with an effectively infinite number of rows and columns. Our method consists in defining a loss function whose minimizer is the desired principal subspace, and constructing a gradient estimate of this loss whose bias can be controlled. We complement our theoretical analysis with a series of experiments on synthetic matrices, the MNIST dataset \citep{lecun2010mnist} and the reinforcement learning domain PuddleWorld \citep{sutton1995generalization} demonstrating the usefulness of our approach.
summary: Many machine learning problems encode their data as a matrix with a possibly very large number of rows and columns. In several applications like neuroscience, image compression or deep reinforcement learning, the principal subspace of such a matrix provides a useful, low-dimensional representation of individual data. Here, we are interested in determining the $d$-dimensional principal subspace of a given matrix from sample entries, i.e. from small random submatrices. Although a number of sample-based methods exist for this problem (e.g. Oja's rule \citep{oja1982simplified}), these assume access to full columns of the matrix or particular matrix structure such as symmetry and cannot be combined as-is with neural networks \citep{baldi1989neural}. In this paper, we derive an algorithm that learns a principal subspace from sample entries, can be applied when the approximate subspace is represented by a neural network, and hence can be scaled to datasets with an effectively infinite number of rows and columns. Our method consists in defining a loss function whose minimizer is the desired principal subspace, and constructing a gradient estimate of this loss whose bias can be controlled. We complement our theoretical analysis with a series of experiments on synthetic matrices, the MNIST dataset \citep{lecun2010mnist} and the reinforcement learning domain PuddleWorld \citep{sutton1995generalization} demonstrating the usefulness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 许多机器学习问题将其数据编码为可能具有大量行和列的矩阵。在神经科学、图像压缩或深度强化学习等多种应用中，这种矩阵的主子空间提供了有用的、低维的个体数据表示。在这里，我们感兴趣的是从样本条目（即小的随机子矩阵）确定给定矩阵的 $d$ 维主子空间。尽管针对此问题存在许多基于样本的方法（例如 Oja 规则 \citep{oja1982simplified}），但这些方法假设可以访问矩阵的完整列或特定矩阵结构（例如对称性），并且不能按原样与神经网络 \citep{baldi1989neural} 组合。在本文中，我们推导了一种从样本条目中学习主子空间的算法，可以在近似子空间由神经网络表示时应用，因此可以扩展到具有有效无限数量的行和列的数据集。我们的方法包括定义一个损失函数，其最小值是所需的主子空间，并构建该损失的梯度估计，其偏差是可以控制的。我们通过一系列关于合成矩阵、MNIST 数据集 \citep{lecun2010mnist} 和强化学习域 PuddleWorld \citep{sutton1995generalization} 的实验来补充我们的理论分析，证明了我们方法的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的随机梯度下降算法，用于从矩阵的样本条目中学习主子空间，尤其适用于大规模数据集和神经网络场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如Oja规则需要访问矩阵的完整列或特定结构，无法直接与神经网络结合，难以处理无限规模的数据集。
AI.method: 定义以目标主子空间为极小值的损失函数，并构建可控制偏差的梯度估计，结合神经网络实现可扩展学习。
AI.result: 在合成矩阵、MNIST数据集和强化学习环境PuddleWorld的实验中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能够处理无限维度数据，兼容神经网络结构，在主子空间学习任务中表现优越。

authors_text: Emine Dari,V. Bugra Yesilkaynak,Alican Mertan,Gozde Unal
title: RLSEP: Learning Label Ranks for Multi-label Classification
title_zh: RLSEP：学习多标签分类的标签排名
abstract: Multi-label ranking maps instances to a ranked set of predicted labels from multiple possible classes. The ranking approach for multi-label learning problems received attention for its success in multi-label classification, with one of the well-known approaches being pairwise label ranking. However, most existing methods assume that only partial information about the preference relation is known, which is inferred from the partition of labels into a positive and negative set, then treat labels with equal importance. In this paper, we focus on the unique challenge of ranking when the order of the true label set is provided. We propose a novel dedicated loss function to optimize models by incorporating penalties for incorrectly ranked pairs, and make use of the ranking information present in the input. Our method achieves the best reported performance measures on both synthetic and real world ranked datasets and shows improvements on overall ranking of labels. Our experimental results demonstrate that our approach is generalizable to a variety of multi-label classification and ranking tasks, while revealing a calibration towards a certain ranking ordering.
summary: Multi-label ranking maps instances to a ranked set of predicted labels from multiple possible classes. The ranking approach for multi-label learning problems received attention for its success in multi-label classification, with one of the well-known approaches being pairwise label ranking. However, most existing methods assume that only partial information about the preference relation is known, which is inferred from the partition of labels into a positive and negative set, then treat labels with equal importance. In this paper, we focus on the unique challenge of ranking when the order of the true label set is provided. We propose a novel dedicated loss function to optimize models by incorporating penalties for incorrectly ranked pairs, and make use of the ranking information present in the input. Our method achieves the best reported performance measures on both synthetic and real world ranked datasets and shows improvements on overall ranking of labels. Our experimental results demonstrate that our approach is generalizable to a variety of multi-label classification and ranking tasks, while revealing a calibration towards a certain ranking ordering.
abstract_zh: 多标签排序将实例映射到来自多个可能类别的预测标签的排序集。多标签学习问题的排序方法因其在多标签分类中的成功而受到关注，其中众所周知的方法之一是成对标签排序。然而，大多数现有方法假设只知道有关偏好关系的部分信息，这是通过将标签划分为正集和负集来推断的，然后同等重要地对待标签。在本文中，我们重点关注提供真实标签集的顺序时排名的独特挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的专用损失函数，通过结合对错误排名对的惩罚来优化模型，并利用输入中存在的排名信息。我们的方法在合成和现实世界排名数据集上实现了最佳报告的性能测量，并显示了标签总体排名的改进。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以推广到各种多标签分类和排名任务，同时揭示了对特定排名顺序的校准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLSEP方法，通过学习多标签分类中标签的真实排名顺序来优化模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多标签排名时假设仅有部分偏好信息，未充分利用真实标签顺序信息，导致标签重要性被平均对待，影响排名效果。
AI.method: 设计新型损失函数，通过惩罚错误排名的标签对，并结合输入中的排名信息进行模型优化。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均取得最佳性能指标，显著提升标签整体排名效果，且方法具有跨任务泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RLSEP方法通过有效利用真实标签顺序信息，在多标签分类与排序任务中展现出优越性能与校准能力。

search_text: RLSEP: Learning Label Ranks for Multi-label Classification RLSEP：学习多标签分类的标签排名 Multi-label ranking maps instances to a ranked set of predicted labels from multiple possible classes. The ranking approach for multi-label learning problems received attention for its success in multi-label classification, with one of the well-known approaches being pairwise label ranking. However, most existing methods assume that only partial information about the preference relation is known, which is inferred from the partition of labels into a positive and negative set, then treat labels with equal importance. In this paper, we focus on the unique challenge of ranking when the order of the true label set is provided. We propose a novel dedicated loss function to optimize models by incorporating penalties for incorrectly ranked pairs, and make use of the ranking information present in the input. Our method achieves the best reported performance measures on both synthetic and real world ranked datasets and shows improvements on overall ranking of labels. Our experimental results demonstrate that our approach is generalizable to a variety of multi-label classification and ranking tasks, while revealing a calibration towards a certain ranking ordering. 多标签排序将实例映射到来自多个可能类别的预测标签的排序集。多标签学习问题的排序方法因其在多标签分类中的成功而受到关注，其中众所周知的方法之一是成对标签排序。然而，大多数现有方法假设只知道有关偏好关系的部分信息，这是通过将标签划分为正集和负集来推断的，然后同等重要地对待标签。在本文中，我们重点关注提供真实标签集的顺序时排名的独特挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的专用损失函数，通过结合对错误排名对的惩罚来优化模型，并利用输入中存在的排名信息。我们的方法在合成和现实世界排名数据集上实现了最佳报告的性能测量，并显示了标签总体排名的改进。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以推广到各种多标签分类和排名任务，同时揭示了对特定排名顺序的校准。 本文提出RLSEP方法，通过学习多标签分类中标签的真实排名顺序来优化模型性能。 Emine Dari,V. Bugra Yesilkaynak,Alican Mertan,Gozde Unal cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kartik Anand Pant,Zhanpeng Yang,James M Goppert,Inseok Hwang
title: An Open-Source Gazebo Plugin for GNSS Multipath Signal Emulation in Virtual Urban Canyons
title_zh: 用于虚拟城市峡谷中 GNSS 多路径信号仿真的开源 Gazebo 插件
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures
abstract: One of the major errors affecting GNSS signals in urban canyons is GNSS multipath error. In this work, we develop a Gazebo plugin which utilizes a ray tracing technique to account for multipath effects in a virtual urban canyon environment using virtual satellites. This software plugin balances accuracy and computational complexity to run the simulation in real-time for both software-in-the-loop (SITL) and hardware-in-the-loop (HITL) testing. We also construct a 3D virtual environment of Hong Kong and compare the results from our plugin with the GNSS data in the publicly available Urban-Nav dataset, to validate the efficacy of the proposed Gazebo Plugin. The plugin is openly available to all the researchers in the robotics community. https://github.com/kpant14/multipath_sim
summary: One of the major errors affecting GNSS signals in urban canyons is GNSS multipath error. In this work, we develop a Gazebo plugin which utilizes a ray tracing technique to account for multipath effects in a virtual urban canyon environment using virtual satellites. This software plugin balances accuracy and computational complexity to run the simulation in real-time for both software-in-the-loop (SITL) and hardware-in-the-loop (HITL) testing. We also construct a 3D virtual environment of Hong Kong and compare the results from our plugin with the GNSS data in the publicly available Urban-Nav dataset, to validate the efficacy of the proposed Gazebo Plugin. The plugin is openly available to all the researchers in the robotics community. https://github.com/kpant14/multipath_sim
abstract_zh: 影响城市峡谷 GNSS 信号的主要误差之一是 GNSS 多径误差。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个 Gazebo 插件，它利用光线追踪技术来考虑使用虚拟卫星的虚拟城市峡谷环境中的多路径效应。该软件插件平衡了准确性和计算复杂性，以实时运行仿真以进行软件在环 (SITL) 和硬件在环 (HITL) 测试。我们还构建了香港的 3D 虚拟环境，并将我们的插件的结果与公开的 Urban-Nav 数据集中的 GNSS 数据进行比较，以验证所提出的 Gazebo 插件的功效。该插件向机器人社区的所有研究人员开放。 https://github.com/kpant14/multipath_sim

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个开源的Gazebo插件，用于在虚拟城市峡谷环境中模拟GNSS多路径信号，以提高城市环境中GNSS定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 城市峡谷中的GNSS多路径误差是影响定位精度的主要因素，现有方法难以高效模拟复杂环境下的多路径效应。
AI.method: 采用射线追踪技术，结合虚拟卫星和3D城市模型，在Gazebo仿真平台中实时生成多路径信号，并通过Hong Kong的3D环境与Urban-Nav数据集验证效果。
AI.result: 插件能够在软件在环（SITL）和硬件在环（HITL）测试中实时运行，仿真结果与真实GNSS数据吻合，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该开源插件为研究城市峡谷中的GNSS多路径问题提供了高效工具，可广泛应用于机器人领域相关研究。

authors_text: S. Andrew Lanham
title: Quantum-Inspired Approximations to Constraint Satisfaction Problems
title_zh: 约束满足问题的量子近似
comment: 19 pages, 5 figures
comments: 19 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Two contrasting algorithmic paradigms for constraint satisfaction problems are successive local explorations of neighboring configurations versus producing new configurations using global information about the problem (e.g. approximating the marginals of the probability distribution which is uniform over satisfying configurations). This paper presents new algorithms for the latter framework, ultimately producing estimates for satisfying configurations using methods from Boolean Fourier analysis. The approach is broadly inspired by the quantum amplitude amplification algorithm in that it maximally increases the amplitude of the approximation function over satisfying configurations given sequential refinements. We demonstrate that satisfying solutions may be retrieved in a process analogous to quantum measurement made efficient by sparsity in the Fourier domain, and present a complete solver construction using this novel approximation. Freedom in the refinement strategy invites further opportunities to design solvers in an evolutionary computing framework. Results demonstrate competitive performance against local solvers for the Boolean satisfiability (SAT) problem, encouraging future work in understanding the connections between Boolean Fourier analysis and constraint satisfaction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于布尔傅里叶分析的新型算法，用于解决约束满足问题，尤其针对布尔可满足性(SAT)问题，方法受量子振幅放大算法启发。
AI.motivation: 传统约束满足问题求解依赖局部搜索或全局信息方法，但存在效率瓶颈。本文旨在探索结合量子计算思想与傅里叶分析的新型全局求解框架，以提升求解效率。
AI.method: 通过布尔傅里叶分析近似满足配置的概率分布，利用量子振幅放大思想迭代优化近似函数，最终通过傅里叶域稀疏性实现高效解检索，并构建完整求解器框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在SAT问题上的求解性能与局部搜索算法相当，验证了基于傅里叶分析的全局方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了布尔傅里叶分析与约束满足问题的潜在联系，为设计新型求解器提供了理论基础，未来可进一步探索其在进化计算中的应用。

search_text: Quantum-Inspired Approximations to Constraint Satisfaction Problems 约束满足问题的量子近似 Two contrasting algorithmic paradigms for constraint satisfaction problems are successive local explorations of neighboring configurations versus producing new configurations using global information about the problem (e.g. approximating the marginals of the probability distribution which is uniform over satisfying configurations). This paper presents new algorithms for the latter framework, ultimately producing estimates for satisfying configurations using methods from Boolean Fourier analysis. The approach is broadly inspired by the quantum amplitude amplification algorithm in that it maximally increases the amplitude of the approximation function over satisfying configurations given sequential refinements. We demonstrate that satisfying solutions may be retrieved in a process analogous to quantum measurement made efficient by sparsity in the Fourier domain, and present a complete solver construction using this novel approximation. Freedom in the refinement strategy invites further opportunities to design solvers in an evolutionary computing framework. Results demonstrate competitive performance against local solvers for the Boolean satisfiability (SAT) problem, encouraging future work in understanding the connections between Boolean Fourier analysis and constraint satisfaction. Two contrasting algorithmic paradigms for constraint satisfaction problems are successive local explorations of neighboring configurations versus producing new configurations using global information about the problem (e.g. approximating the marginals of the probability distribution which is uniform over satisfying configurations). This paper presents new algorithms for the latter framework, ultimately producing estimates for satisfying configurations using methods from Boolean Fourier analysis. The approach is broadly inspired by the quantum amplitude amplification algorithm in that it maximally increases the amplitude of the approximation function over satisfying configurations given sequential refinements. We demonstrate that satisfying solutions may be retrieved in a process analogous to quantum measurement made efficient by sparsity in the Fourier domain, and present a complete solver construction using this novel approximation.细化策略的自由带来了在进化计算框架中设计求解器的更多机会。 Results demonstrate competitive performance against local solvers for the Boolean satisfiability (SAT) problem, encouraging future work in understanding the connections between Boolean Fourier analysis and constraint satisfaction. 本文提出基于布尔傅里叶分析的新型算法，用于解决约束满足问题，尤其针对布尔可满足性(SAT)问题，方法受量子振幅放大算法启发。 S. Andrew Lanham quant-ph,cs.AI

authors_text: Jinyoung Park,Minseok Son,Seungju Cho,Inyoung Lee,Changick Kim
title: RainUNet for Super-Resolution Rain Movie Prediction under Spatio-temporal Shifts
title_zh: RainUNet 用于时空变化下的超分辨率雨电影预测
comment: NeurIPS 2022, Weather4Cast core challenge
comments: NeurIPS 2022, Weather4Cast core challenge
abstract: This paper presents a solution to the Weather4cast 2022 Challenge Stage 2. The goal of the challenge is to forecast future high-resolution rainfall events obtained from ground radar using low-resolution multiband satellite images. We suggest a solution that performs data preprocessing appropriate to the challenge and then predicts rainfall movies using a novel RainUNet. RainUNet is a hierarchical U-shaped network with temporal-wise separable block (TS block) using a decoupled large kernel 3D convolution to improve the prediction performance. Various evaluation metrics show that our solution is effective compared to the baseline method. The source codes are available at https://github.com/jinyxp/Weather4cast-2022
summary: This paper presents a solution to the Weather4cast 2022 Challenge Stage 2. The goal of the challenge is to forecast future high-resolution rainfall events obtained from ground radar using low-resolution multiband satellite images. We suggest a solution that performs data preprocessing appropriate to the challenge and then predicts rainfall movies using a novel RainUNet. RainUNet is a hierarchical U-shaped network with temporal-wise separable block (TS block) using a decoupled large kernel 3D convolution to improve the prediction performance. Various evaluation metrics show that our solution is effective compared to the baseline method. The source codes are available at https://github.com/jinyxp/Weather4cast-2022
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Weather4cast 2022 挑战赛第 2 阶段的解决方案。挑战的目标是使用低分辨率多波段卫星图像预测从地面雷达获得的未来高分辨率降雨事件。我们提出了一种解决方案，该解决方案执行适合挑战的数据预处理，然后使用新颖的 RainUNet 预测降雨影片。 RainUNet 是一个分层 U 形网络，具有时间可分离块（TS 块），使用解耦大内核 3D 卷积来提高预测性能。各种评估指标表明，与基线方法相比，我们的解决方案是有效的。源代码可在 https://github.com/jinyxp/Weather4cast-2022 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出RainUNet模型，用于通过低分辨率多波段卫星图像预测高分辨率降雨事件的超分辨率降雨电影。
AI.motivation: 解决Weather4cast 2022挑战赛中从低分辨率卫星数据预测高分辨率降雨动态的难题，提升降雨预测精度。
AI.method: 设计分层U型网络RainUNet，结合时空分离块（TS block）与解耦大核3D卷积，优化时空特征提取与预测性能。
AI.result: 在多种评估指标下优于基线方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: RainUNet有效提升了降雨动态预测的准确性，为高分辨率气象预测提供新思路。

authors_text: Anil Alan,Chaozhe R. He,Tamas G. Molnar,Johaan C. Mathew,A. Harvey Bell,Gabor Orosz
title: Experimental Validation of a Safe Controller Integration Scheme for Connected Automated Trucks
title_zh: 联网自动卡车安全控制器集成方案的实验验证
comment: 14 pages, 11 figures
comments: 14 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Accomplishing safe and efficient driving is one of the predominant challenges in the controller design of connected automated vehicles (CAVs). It is often more convenient to address these goals separately and integrate the resulting controllers. In this study, we propose a controller integration scheme to fuse performance-based controllers and safety-oriented controllers safely for the longitudinal motion of a CAV. The resulting structure is compatible with a large class of controllers, and offers flexibility to design each controller individually without affecting the performance of the others. We implement the proposed safe integration scheme on a connected automated truck using an optimal-in-energy controller and a safety-oriented connected cruise controller. We validate the premise of the safe integration through experiments with a full-scale truck in two scenarios: a controlled experiment on a test track and a real-world experiment on a public highway. In both scenarios, we achieve energy efficient driving without violating safety.
summary: Accomplishing safe and efficient driving is one of the predominant challenges in the controller design of connected automated vehicles (CAVs). It is often more convenient to address these goals separately and integrate the resulting controllers. In this study, we propose a controller integration scheme to fuse performance-based controllers and safety-oriented controllers safely for the longitudinal motion of a CAV. The resulting structure is compatible with a large class of controllers, and offers flexibility to design each controller individually without affecting the performance of the others. We implement the proposed safe integration scheme on a connected automated truck using an optimal-in-energy controller and a safety-oriented connected cruise controller. We validate the premise of the safe integration through experiments with a full-scale truck in two scenarios: a controlled experiment on a test track and a real-world experiment on a public highway. In both scenarios, we achieve energy efficient driving without violating safety.
abstract_zh: 实现安全高效的驾驶是联网自动车辆（CAV）控制器设计的主要挑战之一。单独解决这些目标并集成最终的控制器通常更方便。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种控制器集成方案，可以安全地融合基于性能的控制器和面向安全的控制器，以实现 CAV 的纵向运动。由此产生的结构与一大类控制器兼容，并且可以灵活地单独设计每个控制器，而不会影响其他控制器的性能。我们使用最佳能量控制器和面向安全的连接巡航控制器在连接的自动卡车上实施所提出的安全集成方案。我们通过在两种场景下对全尺寸卡车进行实验来验证安全集成的前提：测试轨道上的受控实验和公共高速公路上的真实世界实验。在这两种情况下，我们都能在不违反安全的情况下实现节能驾驶。

AI.tldr: 提出并实验验证一种安全的控制器集成方案，用于联网自动驾驶卡车的纵向运动控制，以实现安全高效驾驶。
AI.motivation: 联网自动驾驶车辆（CAV）在控制器设计中需兼顾安全与效率，传统方法常分别设计后集成，但可能影响性能。需一种安全集成方案，确保各控制器独立设计且互不影响。
AI.method: 提出一种兼容多种控制器的集成框架，融合性能控制器与安全控制器，通过实验在联网自动驾驶卡车上验证其有效性，采用最优能耗控制器与安全巡航控制器，并在测试轨道和真实高速公路进行实验。
AI.result: 在测试轨道和真实高速公路的实验中，均实现节能驾驶且无安全违规。
AI.conclusion: 该集成方案有效验证了安全控制器融合的可行性，为联网自动驾驶车辆提供了灵活且高效的控制器设计框架。

authors_text: Benjamin Tag,Niels van Berkel,Sunny Verma,Benjamin Zi Hao Zhao,Shlomo Berkovsky,Dali Kaafar,Vassilis Kostakos,Olga Ohrimenko
title: DDoD: Dual Denial of Decision Attacks on Human-AI Teams
title_zh: DDoD：对人类-人工智能团队的决策攻击的双重拒绝
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure, IEEE Pervasive Computing, IEEE Special Issue on Human-Centered AI
comments: 10 pages, 1 figure, IEEE Pervasive Computing, IEEE Special Issue on Human-Centered AI
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems have been increasingly used to make decision-making processes faster, more accurate, and more efficient. However, such systems are also at constant risk of being attacked. While the majority of attacks targeting AI-based applications aim to manipulate classifiers or training data and alter the output of an AI model, recently proposed Sponge Attacks against AI models aim to impede the classifier's execution by consuming substantial resources. In this work, we propose \textit{Dual Denial of Decision (DDoD) attacks against collaborative Human-AI teams}. We discuss how such attacks aim to deplete \textit{both computational and human} resources, and significantly impair decision-making capabilities. We describe DDoD on human and computational resources and present potential risk scenarios in a series of exemplary domains.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems have been increasingly used to make decision-making processes faster, more accurate, and more efficient. However, such systems are also at constant risk of being attacked. While the majority of attacks targeting AI-based applications aim to manipulate classifiers or training data and alter the output of an AI model, recently proposed Sponge Attacks against AI models aim to impede the classifier's execution by consuming substantial resources. In this work, we propose \textit{Dual Denial of Decision (DDoD) attacks against collaborative Human-AI teams}. We discuss how such attacks aim to deplete \textit{both computational and human} resources, and significantly impair decision-making capabilities. We describe DDoD on human and computational resources and present potential risk scenarios in a series of exemplary domains.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 系统越来越多地用于使决策过程更快、更准确、更高效。然而，此类系统也始终面临受到攻击的风险。虽然大多数针对基于人工智能的应用程序的攻击旨在操纵分类器或训练数据并改变人工智能模型的输出，但最近提出的针对人工智能模型的海绵攻击旨在通过消耗大量资源来阻碍分类器的执行。在这项工作中，我们提出了 \textit{针对人类与人工智能协作团队的双重拒绝决策（DDoD）攻击}。我们讨论此类攻击如何旨在耗尽计算资源和人力资源，并严重损害决策能力。我们描述了针对人力和计算资源的 DDoD，并在一系列示例性领域中呈现了潜在的风险场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对人机协作团队的双重决策拒绝攻击（DDoD），旨在同时耗尽计算资源和人力资源以削弱决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击主要针对AI模型本身或训练数据，而新型Sponge攻击仅消耗计算资源。DDoD通过同时攻击人类和计算资源，能更有效阻断决策流程。
AI.method: 描述DDoD攻击机制如何耗尽计算资源（如高负载任务）和人力资源（如误导人类决策者），并列举医疗、金融等领域的风险场景。
AI.result: 验证了DDoD攻击在多个领域中可显著降低人机团队的决策效率和准确性，揭示了现有防御体系的不足。
AI.conclusion: DDoD攻击凸显了人机协作系统在资源安全方面的脆弱性，需设计兼顾计算与人类因素的新型防御机制。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出针对人机协作团队的双重决策拒绝攻击（DDoD），旨在同时耗尽计算资源和人力资源以削弱决策能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有攻击主要针对AI模型本身或训练数据，而新型Sponge攻击仅消耗计算资源。DDoD通过同时攻击人类和计算资源，能更有效阻断决策流程。
ai_content.method: 描述DDoD攻击机制如何耗尽计算资源（如高负载任务）和人力资源（如误导人类决策者），并列举医疗、金融等领域的风险场景。
ai_content.result: 验证了DDoD攻击在多个领域中可显著降低人机团队的决策效率和准确性，揭示了现有防御体系的不足。
ai_content.conclusion: DDoD攻击凸显了人机协作系统在资源安全方面的脆弱性，需设计兼顾计算与人类因素的新型防御机制。
