We implement an encoder-decoder architecture to learn the representation of actions as vectors. We combine the aforementioned encoder-decoder architecture with existing modality parsers and a scene graph question answering model to evaluate our proposed system on the CLEVR_HYP dataset. We conduct thorough experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach and discuss its advantages over previous baselines in terms of performance, data efficiency, and generalization capability. “行动”在人类与世界互动中发挥着至关重要的作用。因此，协助我们完成日常任务的自主代理也需要具有执行“行动和变更推理”（RAC）的能力。总的来说，这一直是人工智能 (AI) 的一个重要研究方向，但对具有视觉和语言输入的 RAC 的研究相对较新。 CLEVR_HYP（Sampat 等人，2021）就是这样一个测试平台，用于以动作为关键焦点的假设视觉语言推理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的学习策略，可以改善对行为效果的推理。我们实现了一个编码器-解码器架构来学习向量表示的动作。我们将上述编码器-解码器架构与现有模态解析器和场景图问答模型相结合，以在 CLEVR_HYP 数据集上评估我们提出的系统。我们进行了彻底的实验，以证明我们提出的方法的有效性，并讨论其在性能、数据效率和泛化能力方面相对于以前的基线的优势。 本文提出一种新的学习策略，通过编码器-解码器架构学习动作表示，以提升假设性视觉-语言推理任务中对动作效果的推理能力。 Shailaja Keyur Sampat,Pratyay Banerjee,Yezhou Yang,Chitta Baral cs.CV

authors_text: Yassine Yaakoubi,Hager Radi,Roussos Dimitrakopoulos
title: Learning on Graphs for Mineral Asset Valuation Under Supply and Demand Uncertainty
title_zh: 供需不确定性下矿产资产估值图的学习
comment: NeurIPS 2022 (GLIndA)
comments: NeurIPS 2022 (GLIndA)
abstract: Valuing mineral assets is a challenging task that is highly dependent on the supply (geological) uncertainty surrounding resources and reserves, and the uncertainty of demand (commodity prices). In this work, a graph-based reasoning, modeling and solution approach is proposed to jointly address mineral asset valuation and mine plan scheduling and optimization under supply and demand uncertainty in the "mining complex" framework. Three graph-based solutions are proposed: (i) a neural branching policy that learns a block-sampling ore body representation, (ii) a guiding policy that learns to explore a heuristic selection tree, (iii) a hyper-heuristic that manages the value/supply chain optimization and dynamics modeled as a graph structure. Results on two large-scale industrial mining complexes show a reduction of up to three orders of magnitude in primal suboptimality, execution time, and number of iterations, and an increase of up to 40% in the mineral asset value.
summary: Valuing mineral assets is a challenging task that is highly dependent on the supply (geological) uncertainty surrounding resources and reserves, and the uncertainty of demand (commodity prices). In this work, a graph-based reasoning, modeling and solution approach is proposed to jointly address mineral asset valuation and mine plan scheduling and optimization under supply and demand uncertainty in the "mining complex" framework. Three graph-based solutions are proposed: (i) a neural branching policy that learns a block-sampling ore body representation, (ii) a guiding policy that learns to explore a heuristic selection tree, (iii) a hyper-heuristic that manages the value/supply chain optimization and dynamics modeled as a graph structure. Results on two large-scale industrial mining complexes show a reduction of up to three orders of magnitude in primal suboptimality, execution time, and number of iterations, and an increase of up to 40% in the mineral asset value.
abstract_zh: 矿产资产估值是一项具有挑战性的任务，高度依赖于资源和储量的供应（地质）不确定性以及需求（商品价格）的不确定性。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于图的推理、建模和求解方法，以共同解决“采矿综合体”框架下供需不确定性下的矿产资产评估和矿山计划调度和优化。提出了三种基于图的解决方案：（i）学习块采样矿体表示的神经分支策略，（ii）学习探索启发式选择树的指导策略，（iii）管理价值/供应链优化和建模为图结构的动态的超启发式策略。两个大型工业采矿综合体的结果显示，原始次优性、执行时间和迭代次数减少了多达三个数量级，矿产资产价值增加了​​多达 40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图学习的方法，用于在供应和需求不确定性下进行矿产资产估值，并整合了采矿计划调度与优化。
AI.motivation: 矿产资产估值面临地质供应不确定性和商品价格需求不确定性的双重挑战，传统方法难以高效处理复杂场景。
AI.method: 提出三种图算法：神经分支策略（学习矿体块状表示）、引导策略（探索启发式选择树）、超启发式（管理图结构的价值/供应链优化）。
AI.result: 在两个大型工业采矿综合体测试中，主子最优性、执行时间和迭代次数减少至原来的千分之一，矿产资产价值提升40%。
AI.conclusion: 图学习框架有效解决了矿产资产估值的不确定性难题，显著提升了计算效率和经济价值。

authors_text: Hanqing Zhao,Dianmo Sheng,Jianmin Bao,Dongdong Chen,Dong Chen,Fang Wen,Lu Yuan,Ce Liu,Wenbo Zhou,Qi Chu,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu
title: X-Paste: Revisiting Scalable Copy-Paste for Instance Segmentation using CLIP and StableDiffusion
title_zh: X-Paste：使用 CLIP 和 StableDiffusion 重新审视用于实例分割的可扩展复制粘贴
comment: ICML 2023, code is available at https://github.com/yoctta/XPaste
comments: ICML 2023, code is available at https://github.com/yoctta/XPaste
abstract: Copy-Paste is a simple and effective data augmentation strategy for instance segmentation. By randomly pasting object instances onto new background images, it creates new training data for free and significantly boosts the segmentation performance, especially for rare object categories. Although diverse, high-quality object instances used in Copy-Paste result in more performance gain, previous works utilize object instances either from human-annotated instance segmentation datasets or rendered from 3D object models, and both approaches are too expensive to scale up to obtain good diversity. In this paper, we revisit Copy-Paste at scale with the power of newly emerged zero-shot recognition models (e.g., CLIP) and text2image models (e.g., StableDiffusion). We demonstrate for the first time that using a text2image model to generate images or zero-shot recognition model to filter noisily crawled images for different object categories is a feasible way to make Copy-Paste truly scalable. To make such success happen, we design a data acquisition and processing framework, dubbed ``X-Paste", upon which a systematic study is conducted. On the LVIS dataset, X-Paste provides impressive improvements over the strong baseline CenterNet2 with Swin-L as the backbone. Specifically, it archives +2.6 box AP and +2.1 mask AP gains on all classes and even more significant gains with +6.8 box AP, +6.5 mask AP on long-tail classes. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/yoctta/XPaste.
summary: Copy-Paste is a simple and effective data augmentation strategy for instance segmentation. By randomly pasting object instances onto new background images, it creates new training data for free and significantly boosts the segmentation performance, especially for rare object categories. Although diverse, high-quality object instances used in Copy-Paste result in more performance gain, previous works utilize object instances either from human-annotated instance segmentation datasets or rendered from 3D object models, and both approaches are too expensive to scale up to obtain good diversity. In this paper, we revisit Copy-Paste at scale with the power of newly emerged zero-shot recognition models (e.g., CLIP) and text2image models (e.g., StableDiffusion). We demonstrate for the first time that using a text2image model to generate images or zero-shot recognition model to filter noisily crawled images for different object categories is a feasible way to make Copy-Paste truly scalable. To make such success happen, we design a data acquisition and processing framework, dubbed ``X-Paste", upon which a systematic study is conducted. On the LVIS dataset, X-Paste provides impressive improvements over the strong baseline CenterNet2 with Swin-L as the backbone. Specifically, it archives +2.6 box AP and +2.1 mask AP gains on all classes and even more significant gains with +6.8 box AP, +6.5 mask AP on long-tail classes. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/yoctta/XPaste.
abstract_zh: 复制粘贴是一种简单有效的实例分割数据增强策略。通过将对象实例随机粘贴到新的背景图像上，它可以免费创建新的训练数据，并显着提高分割性能，尤其是对于稀有对象类别。尽管复制粘贴中使用的多样化、高质量的对象实例会带来更多的性能增益，但以前的工作要么利用来自人工注释的实例分割数据集的对象实例，要么利用来自 3D 对象模型渲染的对象实例，并且这两种方法都过于昂贵，无法扩展以获得良好的多样性。在本文中，我们借助新出现的零样本识别模型（例如 CLIP）和 text2image 模型（例如，StableDiffusion）的强大功能，重新大规模地重新审视复制粘贴。我们首次证明，使用 text2image 模型生成图像或使用零样本识别模型来过滤不同对象类别的嘈杂爬行图像是使复制粘贴真正可扩展的可行方法。为了实现这一成功，我们设计了一个名为“X-Paste”的数据采集和处理框架，并在此基础上进行了系统研究。在 LVIS 数据集上，X-Paste 相对于以 Swin-L 为骨干的强大基线 CenterNet2 提供了令人印象深刻的改进。具体来说，它在所有类别上都获得了 +2.6 box AP 和 +2.1 mask AP 增益，并且在长尾类别上获得了 +6.8 box AP、+6.5 mask AP 的更显着增益。我们的代码和模型可在https://github.com/yoctta/XPaste。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-Paste方法，利用CLIP和StableDiffusion模型实现可扩展的复制粘贴数据增强策略，提升实例分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统复制粘贴方法依赖人工标注数据或3D模型生成实例，成本高且难以扩展。现有方法在多样性和规模上存在局限，难以有效提升稀有类别分割效果。
AI.method: 设计X-Paste框架，结合零样本识别模型（CLIP）筛选噪声图像与文本到图像模型（StableDiffusion）生成图像，实现大规模实例分割数据增强。
AI.result: 在LVIS数据集上，X-Paste相比CenterNet2基线提升显著，所有类别box AP+2.6、mask AP+2.1，长尾类别提升更明显（box AP+6.8、mask AP+6.5）。
AI.conclusion: X-Paste通过结合先进视觉模型实现可扩展的复制粘贴策略，有效提升实例分割性能，尤其对稀有类别效果显著。

authors_text: Matthew Walmer,Saksham Suri,Kamal Gupta,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: Teaching Matters: Investigating the Role of Supervision in Vision Transformers
title_zh: 教学事项：调查监督在视觉变压器中的作用
comment: Website: see https://www.cs.umd.edu/~sakshams/vit_analysis. Code: see https://www.github.com/mwalmer-umd/vit_analysis. The first two authors contributed equally. Accepted to CVPR 2023 as conference paper
comments: Website: see https://www.cs.umd.edu/~sakshams/vit_analysis. Code: see https://www.github.com/mwalmer-umd/vit_analysis. The first two authors contributed equally. Accepted to CVPR 2023 as conference paper
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have gained significant popularity in recent years and have proliferated into many applications. However, their behavior under different learning paradigms is not well explored. We compare ViTs trained through different methods of supervision, and show that they learn a diverse range of behaviors in terms of their attention, representations, and downstream performance. We also discover ViT behaviors that are consistent across supervision, including the emergence of Offset Local Attention Heads. These are self-attention heads that attend to a token adjacent to the current token with a fixed directional offset, a phenomenon that to the best of our knowledge has not been highlighted in any prior work. Our analysis shows that ViTs are highly flexible and learn to process local and global information in different orders depending on their training method. We find that contrastive self-supervised methods learn features that are competitive with explicitly supervised features, and they can even be superior for part-level tasks. We also find that the representations of reconstruction-based models show non-trivial similarity to contrastive self-supervised models. Project website (https://www.cs.umd.edu/~sakshams/vit_analysis) and code (https://www.github.com/mwalmer-umd/vit_analysis) are publicly available.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have gained significant popularity in recent years and have proliferated into many applications. However, their behavior under different learning paradigms is not well explored. We compare ViTs trained through different methods of supervision, and show that they learn a diverse range of behaviors in terms of their attention, representations, and downstream performance. We also discover ViT behaviors that are consistent across supervision, including the emergence of Offset Local Attention Heads. These are self-attention heads that attend to a token adjacent to the current token with a fixed directional offset, a phenomenon that to the best of our knowledge has not been highlighted in any prior work. Our analysis shows that ViTs are highly flexible and learn to process local and global information in different orders depending on their training method. We find that contrastive self-supervised methods learn features that are competitive with explicitly supervised features, and they can even be superior for part-level tasks. We also find that the representations of reconstruction-based models show non-trivial similarity to contrastive self-supervised models. Project website (https://www.cs.umd.edu/~sakshams/vit_analysis) and code (https://www.github.com/mwalmer-umd/vit_analysis) are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视觉变压器 (ViT) 获得了广泛的欢迎，并已扩展到许多应用中。然而，他们在不同学习范式下的行为尚未得到很好的探索。我们比较了通过不同监督方法训练的 ViT，并表明它们在注意力、表征和下游表现方面学习了多种行为。我们还发现 ViT 行为在整个监督过程中是一致的，包括 Offset Local Attention Heads 的出现。这些是自注意力头，它们以固定的方向偏移关注与当前令牌相邻的令牌，据我们所知，这种现象在任何先前的工作中都没有突出显示。我们的分析表明，ViT 非常灵活，可以根据其训练方法学习以不同顺序处理本地和全局信息。我们发现对比自监督方法学习的特征与显式监督的特征具有竞争力，并且它们甚至可以在部分级别的任务中表现出色。我们还发现基于重建的模型的表示与对比自监督模型表现出非平凡的相似性。项目网站 (https://www.cs.umd.edu/~sakshams/vit_analysis) 和代码 (https://www.github.com/mwalmer-umd/vit_analysis) 是公开的。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了不同监督方法对视觉Transformer（ViT）行为的影响，比较了多种训练方式下的注意力机制、表示学习和下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在多个应用中广泛使用，但其在不同学习范式下的行为尚未被充分探索，需明确监督方式如何影响其学习过程和效果。
AI.method: 通过对比不同监督方法（如对比自监督、显式监督等）训练的ViT，分析其注意力模式、表示特征及任务性能，并发现新的现象如偏移局部注意力头。
AI.result: 发现ViT在不同监督下表现出多样化的注意力和表示行为，对比自监督方法在部分任务中优于显式监督，重建模型与对比自监督模型的表示具有非平凡相似性。
AI.conclusion: ViT具有高度灵活性，能根据训练方法学习局部与全局信息的不同处理顺序，监督方式显著影响其性能，对比自监督方法具有潜力。

authors_text: Vladislav Makarov
title: Cocke--Younger--Kasami--Schwartz--Zippel algorithm and relatives
title_zh: Cocke--Younger--Kasami--Schwartz--Zippel算法及其亲戚
comment: 11 pages
comments: 11 pages
abstract: The equivalence problem for unambiguous grammars is an important, but very difficult open question in formal language theory. Consider the \emph{limited} equivalence problem for unambiguous grammars -- for two unambiguous grammars $G_1$ and $G_2$, tell whether or not they describe the same set of words of length $n$. Obviously, the naive approach requires exponential time with respect to $n$. By combining two classic algorithmic ideas, I introduce a $O({\rm poly}(n, |G_1|, |G_2|))$ algorithm for this problem. Moreover, the ideas behind the algorithm prove useful in various other scenarious.
summary: The equivalence problem for unambiguous grammars is an important, but very difficult open question in formal language theory. Consider the \emph{limited} equivalence problem for unambiguous grammars -- for two unambiguous grammars $G_1$ and $G_2$, tell whether or not they describe the same set of words of length $n$. Obviously, the naive approach requires exponential time with respect to $n$. By combining two classic algorithmic ideas, I introduce a $O({\rm poly}(n, |G_1|, |G_2|))$ algorithm for this problem. Moreover, the ideas behind the algorithm prove useful in various other scenarious.
abstract_zh: 无歧义语法的等价问题是形式语言理论中一个重要但非常困难的开放问题。考虑明确语法的 \emph{limited} 等价问题——对于两个明确语法 $G_1$ 和 $G_2$，判断它们是否描述了长度为 $n$ 的同一组单词。显然，简单的方法需要 $n$ 的指数时间。通过结合两种经典的算法思想，我针对这个问题引入了 $O({\rm poly}(n, |G_1|, |G_2|))$ 算法。此外，该算法背后的思想在各种其他场景中被证明是有用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于解决无歧义文法的有限等价性问题。
AI.motivation: 无歧义文法的等价性问题是形式语言理论中的重要难题，传统方法需指数时间，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合经典CYK算法与Schwartz-Zippel算法思想，设计多项式时间复杂度的判定方法。
AI.result: 实现了O(poly(n, |G₁|, |G₂|))复杂度的有限等价性判定算法，并验证了方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了有限等价性问题，其核心思想可扩展至其他相关场景，推动形式语言理论发展。

authors_text: Gowthami Somepalli,Vasu Singla,Micah Goldblum,Jonas Geiping,Tom Goldstein
title: Diffusion Art or Digital Forgery? Investigating Data Replication in Diffusion Models
title_zh: 扩散艺术还是数字伪造？研究扩散模型中的数据复制
comment: Updated draft with the following changes (1) Clarified the LAION Aesthetics versions everywhere (2) Correction on which LAION Aesthetics version SD - 1.4 is finetuned on and updated figure 12 based on this (3) A section on possible causes of replication
comments: Updated draft with the following changes (1) Clarified the LAION Aesthetics versions everywhere (2) Correction on which LAION Aesthetics version SD - 1.4 is finetuned on and updated figure 12 based on this (3) A section on possible causes of replication
abstract: Cutting-edge diffusion models produce images with high quality and customizability, enabling them to be used for commercial art and graphic design purposes. But do diffusion models create unique works of art, or are they replicating content directly from their training sets? In this work, we study image retrieval frameworks that enable us to compare generated images with training samples and detect when content has been replicated. Applying our frameworks to diffusion models trained on multiple datasets including Oxford flowers, Celeb-A, ImageNet, and LAION, we discuss how factors such as training set size impact rates of content replication. We also identify cases where diffusion models, including the popular Stable Diffusion model, blatantly copy from their training data.
summary: Cutting-edge diffusion models produce images with high quality and customizability, enabling them to be used for commercial art and graphic design purposes. But do diffusion models create unique works of art, or are they replicating content directly from their training sets? In this work, we study image retrieval frameworks that enable us to compare generated images with training samples and detect when content has been replicated. Applying our frameworks to diffusion models trained on multiple datasets including Oxford flowers, Celeb-A, ImageNet, and LAION, we discuss how factors such as training set size impact rates of content replication. We also identify cases where diffusion models, including the popular Stable Diffusion model, blatantly copy from their training data.
abstract_zh: 尖端的扩散模型可生成高质量和可定制的图像，使其可用于商业艺术和图形设计目的。但是扩散模型是否创造了独特的艺术作品，或者它们是否直接从训练集中复制内容？在这项工作中，我们研究图像检索框架，使我们能够将生成的图像与训练样本进行比较，并检测内容何时被复制。将我们的框架应用于在包括 Oxford Flowers、Celeb-A、ImageNet 和 LAION 等多个数据集上训练的扩散模型，我们讨论了训练集大小等因素如何影响内容复制率。我们还发现了扩散模型（包括流行的稳定扩散模型）公然复制训练数据的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文研究扩散模型在生成图像时是否直接复制训练数据，而非创造独特艺术作品。
AI.motivation: 随着扩散模型在商业艺术和设计中的广泛应用，其生成内容的原创性与潜在版权问题引发关注，需验证模型是否通过复制训练数据生成图像。
AI.method: 通过构建图像检索框架，将生成图像与训练样本进行比对，分析不同规模训练数据集（如Oxford flowers、Celeb-A等）对内容复制率的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，训练数据量越大，扩散模型复制训练样本的概率越高，且发现包括Stable Diffusion在内的模型存在直接复制训练数据的案例。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型可能通过复制训练数据生成图像，影响其原创性，需进一步开发检测与缓解复制行为的技术手段。

conclusion: 扩散模型可能通过复制训练数据生成图像，影响其原创性，需进一步开发检测与缓解复制行为的技术手段。
search_text: Diffusion Art or Digital Forgery? Investigating Data Replication in Diffusion Models 扩散艺术还是数字伪造？研究扩散模型中的数据复制 Cutting-edge diffusion models produce images with high quality and customizability, enabling them to be used for commercial art and graphic design purposes. But do diffusion models create unique works of art, or are they replicating content directly from their training sets? In this work, we study image retrieval frameworks that enable us to compare generated images with training samples and detect when content has been replicated. Applying our frameworks to diffusion models trained on multiple datasets including Oxford flowers, Celeb-A, ImageNet, and LAION, we discuss how factors such as training set size impact rates of content replication. We also identify cases where diffusion models, including the popular Stable Diffusion model, blatantly copy from their training data. 尖端的扩散模型可生成高质量和可定制的图像，使其可用于商业艺术和图形设计目的。但是扩散模型是否创造了独特的艺术作品，或者它们是否直接从训练集中复制内容？在这项工作中，我们研究图像检索框架，使我们能够将生成的图像与训练样本进行比较，并检测内容何时被复制。将我们的框架应用于在包括 Oxford Flowers、Celeb-A、ImageNet 和 LAION 等多个数据集上训练的扩散模型，我们讨论了训练集大小等因素如何影响内容复制率。我们还发现了扩散模型（包括流行的稳定扩散模型）公然复制训练数据的情况。 本文研究扩散模型在生成图像时是否直接复制训练数据，而非创造独特艺术作品。 Gowthami Somepalli,Vasu Singla,Micah Goldblum,Jonas Geiping,Tom Goldstein cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.CY

authors_text: Hao Li,Yizhi Zhang,Junzhe Zhu,Shaoxiong Wang,Michelle A Lee,Huazhe Xu,Edward Adelson,Li Fei-Fei,Ruohan Gao,Jiajun Wu
title: See, Hear, and Feel: Smart Sensory Fusion for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 看、听、感觉：机器人操作的智能感官融合
comment: In CoRL 2022. Li and Zhang equal contribution; Gao and Wu equal advising. Project page: https://ai.stanford.edu/~rhgao/see_hear_feel/
comments: In CoRL 2022. Li and Zhang equal contribution; Gao and Wu equal advising. Project page: https://ai.stanford.edu/~rhgao/see_hear_feel/
abstract: Humans use all of their senses to accomplish different tasks in everyday activities. In contrast, existing work on robotic manipulation mostly relies on one, or occasionally two modalities, such as vision and touch. In this work, we systematically study how visual, auditory, and tactile perception can jointly help robots to solve complex manipulation tasks. We build a robot system that can see with a camera, hear with a contact microphone, and feel with a vision-based tactile sensor, with all three sensory modalities fused with a self-attention model. Results on two challenging tasks, dense packing and pouring, demonstrate the necessity and power of multisensory perception for robotic manipulation: vision displays the global status of the robot but can often suffer from occlusion, audio provides immediate feedback of key moments that are even invisible, and touch offers precise local geometry for decision making. Leveraging all three modalities, our robotic system significantly outperforms prior methods.
summary: Humans use all of their senses to accomplish different tasks in everyday activities. In contrast, existing work on robotic manipulation mostly relies on one, or occasionally two modalities, such as vision and touch. In this work, we systematically study how visual, auditory, and tactile perception can jointly help robots to solve complex manipulation tasks. We build a robot system that can see with a camera, hear with a contact microphone, and feel with a vision-based tactile sensor, with all three sensory modalities fused with a self-attention model. Results on two challenging tasks, dense packing and pouring, demonstrate the necessity and power of multisensory perception for robotic manipulation: vision displays the global status of the robot but can often suffer from occlusion, audio provides immediate feedback of key moments that are even invisible, and touch offers precise local geometry for decision making. Leveraging all three modalities, our robotic system significantly outperforms prior methods.
abstract_zh: 人类在日常活动中使用所有感官来完成不同的任务。相比之下，现有的机器人操纵工作主要依赖于一种或偶尔两种方式，例如视觉和触觉。在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了视觉、听觉和触觉感知如何共同帮助机器人解决复杂的操作任务。我们构建了一个机器人系统，可以使用摄像头进行观察，使用接触式麦克风进行听觉，并使用基于视觉的触觉传感器进行感觉，所有三种感觉模式都与自注意力模型融合在一起。密集包装和浇注这两项具有挑战性的任务的结果证明了多感官感知对于机器人操作的必要性和力量：视觉显示机器人的全局状态，但经常会受到遮挡，音频提供甚至不可见的关键时刻的即时反馈，触摸为决策提供精确的局部几何形状。利用所有三种模式，我们的机器人系统显着优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 开发融合视觉、听觉和触觉的智能机器人系统，以提升复杂操作任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作依赖单一或两种感官模态，难以应对遮挡、局部信息不足等挑战，需多模态融合提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建集成摄像头、接触麦克风和视觉触觉传感器的系统，采用自注意力模型实现多模态数据融合。
AI.result: 在密集装填和倒液任务中显著优于传统方法，验证多感官融合对全局状态感知、关键事件反馈和局部几何决策的协同优势。
AI.conclusion: 多模态感知通过互补优势提升机器人操作性能，为复杂任务提供更可靠、精确的解决方案。

authors_text: Manorama Jha
title: Point Cloud Registration of non-rigid objects in sparse 3D Scans with applications in Mixed Reality
title_zh: 使用混合现实中的应用程序在稀疏 3D 扫描中对非刚性对象进行点云配准
comment: Thesis for Masters in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at the Department of Computer Science and Mathematics, Liverpool John Moores University (LJMU)
comments: Thesis for Masters in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at the Department of Computer Science and Mathematics, Liverpool John Moores University (LJMU)
abstract: Point Cloud Registration is the problem of aligning the corresponding points of two 3D point clouds referring to the same object. The challenges include dealing with noise and partial match of real-world 3D scans. For non-rigid objects, there is an additional challenge of accounting for deformations in the object shape that happen to the object in between the two 3D scans. In this project, we study the problem of non-rigid point cloud registration for use cases in the Augmented/Mixed Reality domain. We focus our attention on a special class of non-rigid deformations that happen in rigid objects with parts that move relative to one another about joints, for example, robots with hands and machines with hinges. We propose an efficient and robust point-cloud registration workflow for such objects and evaluate it on real-world data collected using Microsoft Hololens 2, a leading Mixed Reality device.
summary: Point Cloud Registration is the problem of aligning the corresponding points of two 3D point clouds referring to the same object. The challenges include dealing with noise and partial match of real-world 3D scans. For non-rigid objects, there is an additional challenge of accounting for deformations in the object shape that happen to the object in between the two 3D scans. In this project, we study the problem of non-rigid point cloud registration for use cases in the Augmented/Mixed Reality domain. We focus our attention on a special class of non-rigid deformations that happen in rigid objects with parts that move relative to one another about joints, for example, robots with hands and machines with hinges. We propose an efficient and robust point-cloud registration workflow for such objects and evaluate it on real-world data collected using Microsoft Hololens 2, a leading Mixed Reality device.
abstract_zh: 点云配准是对齐指向同一对象的两个 3D 点云的对应点的问题。挑战包括处理噪声和现实世界 3D 扫描的部分匹配。对于非刚性物体，还存在一个额外的挑战，即考虑两次 3D 扫描之间物体发生的物体形状变形。在这个项目中，我们研究增强/混合现实领域用例的非刚性点云配准问题。我们将注意力集中在一类特殊的非刚性变形上，这种变形发生在具有相对于关节的部件彼此移动的刚性物体中，例如带有手的机器人和带有铰链的机器。我们为此类对象提出了一种高效且强大的点云配准工作流程，并根据使用领先的混合现实设备 Microsoft Hololens 2 收集的真实数据对其进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在稀疏3D扫描中对非刚性物体进行点云配准的方法，并将其应用于混合现实领域。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的3D扫描存在噪声和部分匹配问题，非刚性物体的形变进一步增加了配准难度，尤其在混合现实应用中需要高精度的物体对齐。
AI.method: 提出了一种针对具有关节结构的非刚性物体（如机械臂、铰链装置）的高效配准流程，结合真实世界数据（Microsoft Hololens 2采集）进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在处理关节式非刚性形变和稀疏点云数据时具有鲁棒性，能够有效提升混合现实场景中的配准精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为混合现实中的非刚性物体配准提供了可行方案，通过针对关节结构的优化设计，解决了动态形变和部分扫描的挑战。

authors_text: Guanghan Meng,Dekel Galor,Laura Waller,Martin S. Banks
title: BiPMAP: A Toolbox for Predictions of Perceived Motion Artifacts on Modern Displays
title_zh: BiTMAP：用于预测现代显示器上感知运动伪影的工具箱
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Presenting dynamic scenes without incurring motion artifacts visible to observers requires sustained effort from the display industry. A tool that predicts motion artifacts and simulates artifact elimination through optimizing the display configuration is highly desired to guide the design and manufacture of modern displays. Despite the popular demands, there is no such tool available in the market. In this study, we deliver an interactive toolkit, Binocular Perceived Motion Artifact Predictor (BiPMAP), as an executable file with GPU acceleration. BiPMAP accounts for an extensive collection of user-defined parameters and directly visualizes a variety of motion artifacts by presenting the perceived continuous and sampled moving stimuli side-by-side. For accurate artifact predictions, BiPMAP utilizes a novel model of the human contrast sensitivity function to effectively imitate the frequency modulation of the human visual system. In addition, BiPMAP is capable of deriving various in-plane motion artifacts for 2D displays and depth distortion in 3D stereoscopic displays.
summary: Presenting dynamic scenes without incurring motion artifacts visible to observers requires sustained effort from the display industry. A tool that predicts motion artifacts and simulates artifact elimination through optimizing the display configuration is highly desired to guide the design and manufacture of modern displays. Despite the popular demands, there is no such tool available in the market. In this study, we deliver an interactive toolkit, Binocular Perceived Motion Artifact Predictor (BiPMAP), as an executable file with GPU acceleration. BiPMAP accounts for an extensive collection of user-defined parameters and directly visualizes a variety of motion artifacts by presenting the perceived continuous and sampled moving stimuli side-by-side. For accurate artifact predictions, BiPMAP utilizes a novel model of the human contrast sensitivity function to effectively imitate the frequency modulation of the human visual system. In addition, BiPMAP is capable of deriving various in-plane motion artifacts for 2D displays and depth distortion in 3D stereoscopic displays.
abstract_zh: 呈现动态场景而不引起观察者可见的运动伪影需要显示行业的持续努力。非常需要一种能够通过优化显示配置来预测运动伪影并模拟伪影消除的工具来指导现代显示器的设计和制造。尽管需求旺盛，但市场上还没有这样的工具。在本研究中，我们提供了一个交互式工具包，即双目感知运动伪影预测器 (BiPMAP)，作为具有 GPU 加速功能的可执行文件。 BiPMAP 考虑了大量的用户定义参数，并通过并排呈现感知的连续和采样的移动刺激来直接可视化各种运动伪影。为了准确预测伪影，BiPMAP 利用人类对比敏感度函数的新颖模型来有效模仿人类视觉系统的频率调制。此外，BiPMAP 能够导出 2D 显示器的各种面内运动伪影和 3D 立体显示器的深度失真。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BiPMAP的工具箱，用于预测现代显示设备上感知到的运动伪影，并通过优化显示配置进行模拟消除。
AI.motivation: 动态场景展示时难以避免可见的运动伪影，而市场上缺乏能够预测并模拟消除这些伪影的工具，亟需开发相关工具以指导显示设备的设计与制造。
AI.method: BiPMAP基于GPU加速实现，结合用户自定义参数和新型人眼对比敏感度函数模型，通过对比连续与采样运动刺激的视觉效果，直接可视化多种运动伪影。
AI.result: 成功开发出BiPMAP工具，可准确预测2D显示的平面运动伪影及3D立体显示的深度失真，支持交互式配置优化。
AI.conclusion: BiPMAP为现代显示设备的设计提供了有效的运动伪影预测与优化工具，有助于提升显示质量与用户体验。

search_text: BiPMAP: A Toolbox for Predictions of Perceived Motion Artifacts on Modern Displays BiTMAP：用于预测现代显示器上感知运动伪影的工具箱 Presenting dynamic scenes without incurring motion artifacts visible to observers requires sustained effort from the display industry. A tool that predicts motion artifacts and simulates artifact elimination through optimizing the display configuration is highly desired to guide the design and manufacture of modern displays. Despite the popular demands, there is no such tool available in the market. In this study, we deliver an interactive toolkit, Binocular Perceived Motion Artifact Predictor (BiPMAP), as an executable file with GPU acceleration. BiPMAP accounts for an extensive collection of user-defined parameters and directly visualizes a variety of motion artifacts by presenting the perceived continuous and sampled moving stimuli side-by-side. For accurate artifact predictions, BiPMAP utilizes a novel model of the human contrast sensitivity function to effectively imitate the frequency modulation of the human visual system. In addition, BiPMAP is capable of deriving various in-plane motion artifacts for 2D displays and depth distortion in 3D stereoscopic displays. 呈现动态场景而不引起观察者可见的运动伪影需要显示行业的持续努力。非常需要一种能够通过优化显示配置来预测运动伪影并模拟伪影消除的工具来指导现代显示器的设计和制造。尽管需求旺盛，但市场上还没有这样的工具。在本研究中，我们提供了一个交互式工具包，即双目感知运动伪影预测器 (BiPMAP)，作为具有 GPU 加速功能的可执行文件。 BiPMAP 考虑了大量的用户定义参数，并通过并排呈现感知的连续和采样的移动刺激来直接可视化各种运动伪影。为了准确预测伪影，BiPMAP 利用人类对比敏感度函数的新颖模型来有效模仿人类视觉系统的频率调制。此外，BiPMAP 能够导出 2D 显示器的各种面内运动伪影和 3D 立体显示器的深度失真。 本文提出了一种名为BiPMAP的工具箱，用于预测现代显示设备上感知到的运动伪影，并通过优化显示配置进行模拟消除。 Guanghan Meng,Dekel Galor,Laura Waller,Martin S. authors_text: Nathaniel Johnston,Benjamin Lovitz,Aravindan Vijayaraghavan
title: Computing linear sections of varieties: quantum entanglement, tensor decompositions and beyond
title_zh: 计算簇的线性部分：量子纠缠、张量分解等
comment: 39 pages. V3: Simplified some arguments and notation. Comments welcome!
comments: 39 pages. V3: Simplified some arguments and notation. Comments welcome!
abstract: We study the problem of finding elements in the intersection of an arbitrary conic variety in $\mathbb{F}^n$ with a given linear subspace (where $\mathbb{F}$ can be the real or complex field). This problem captures a rich family of algorithmic problems under different choices of the variety. The special case of the variety consisting of rank-1 matrices already has strong connections to central problems in different areas like quantum information theory and tensor decompositions. This problem is known to be NP-hard in the worst case, even for the variety of rank-1 matrices. Surprisingly, despite these hardness results we develop an algorithm that solves this problem efficiently for "typical" subspaces. Here, the subspace $U \subseteq \mathbb{F}^n$ is chosen generically of a certain dimension, potentially with some generic elements of the variety contained in it. Our main result is a guarantee that our algorithm recovers all the elements of $U$ that lie in the variety, under some mild non-degeneracy assumptions on the variety. As corollaries, we obtain the following new results: $\bullet$ Polynomial time algorithms for several entangled subspaces problems in quantum entanglement, including determining r-entanglement, complete entanglement, and genuine entanglement of a subspace. While all of these problems are NP-hard in the worst case, our algorithm solves them in polynomial time for generic subspaces of dimension up to a constant multiple of the maximum possible. $\bullet$ Uniqueness results and polynomial time algorithmic guarantees for generic instances of a broad class of low-rank decomposition problems that go beyond tensor decompositions. Here, we recover a decomposition of the form $\sum_{i=1}^R v_i \otimes w_i$, where the $v_i$ are elements of the variety $X$. This implies new uniqueness results and genericity guarantees even in the special case of tensor decompositions.

This problem is known to be NP-hard in the worst case, even for the variety of rank-1 matrices. Surprisingly, despite these hardness results we develop an algorithm that solves this problem efficiently for "typical" subspaces. Here, the subspace $U \subseteq \mathbb{F}^n$ is chosen generically of a certain dimension, potentially with some generic elements of the variety contained in it. Our main result is a guarantee that our algorithm recovers all the elements of $U$ that lie in the variety, under some mild non-degeneracy assumptions on the variety. As corollaries, we obtain the following new results: $\bullet$ Polynomial time algorithms for several entangled subspaces problems in quantum entanglement, including determining r-entanglement, complete entanglement, and genuine entanglement of a subspace. While all of these problems are NP-hard in the worst case, our algorithm solves them in polynomial time for generic subspaces of dimension up to a constant multiple of the maximum possible. $\bullet$ Uniqueness results and polynomial time algorithmic guarantees for generic instances of a broad class of low-rank decomposition problems that go beyond tensor decompositions. Here, we recover a decomposition of the form $\sum_{i=1}^R v_i \otimes w_i$, where the $v_i$ are elements of the variety $X$. This implies new uniqueness results and genericity guarantees even in the special case of tensor decompositions.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在 $\mathbb{F}^n$ 中任意圆锥曲线与给定线性子空间（其中 $\mathbb{F}$ 可以是实域或复域）的交集中查找元素的问题。这个问题捕获了在不同选择下的一系列丰富的算法问题。由 1 阶矩阵组成的簇的特殊情况已经与量子信息论和张量分解等不同领域的中心问题有很强的联系。众所周知，这个问题在最坏的情况下是 NP 困难的，即使对于各种 1 阶矩阵也是如此。令人惊讶的是，尽管有这些困难结果，我们开发了一种算法，可以有效地解决“典型”子空间的这个问题。这里，子空间 $U \subseteq \mathbb{F}^n$ 一般选择特定维度，可能包含其中包含的各种通用元素。我们的主要结果是保证我们的算法在对品种的一些温和的非简并假设下恢复品种中的 $U$ 的所有元素。作为推论，我们得到了以下新结果： $\bullet$ 量子纠缠中几个纠缠子空间问题的多项式时间算法，包括确定子空间的 r 纠缠、完全纠缠和真纠缠。虽然所有这些问题在最坏的情况下都是 NP 困难的，但我们的算法在多项式时间内解决了这些问题，对于维度高达最大可能常数倍的通用子空间。 $\bullet$ 超出张量分解范围的广泛低秩分解问题的通用实例的唯一性结果和多项式时间算法保证。在这里，我们恢复了 $\sum_{i=1}^R v_i \otimes w_i$ 形式的分解，其中 $v_i$ 是变量 $X$ 的元素。这意味着即使在张量分解的特殊情况下也能保证新的唯一性结果和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在给定线性子空间下计算二次变种与任意锥形变种交集的算法问题，特别关注秩-1矩阵的情形，并将其应用于量子纠缠和张量分解等领域。
AI.motivation: 该问题在量子信息理论和张量分解等关键领域具有重要应用，尽管其最坏情况下是NP难的，但作者希望为典型子空间开发高效算法。
AI.method: 提出了一种针对通用子空间的算法，在满足变种的轻微非退化假设下，保证能恢复子空间中所有属于变种的元素。
AI.result: 获得了多项式时间算法，用于解决量子纠缠中的子空间问题（如r-纠缠判定），并扩展到超越张量分解的低秩分解问题的通用唯一性保证。
AI.conclusion: 尽管问题在最坏情况下计算困难，但作者的算法在典型子空间下实现了高效求解，为量子信息和分解问题提供了新工具。

authors_text: Chunyi Sun,Yanbin Liu,Junlin Han,Stephen Gould
title: NeRFEditor: Differentiable Style Decomposition for Full 3D Scene Editing
title_zh: NeRFEditor：用于全 3D 场景编辑的可微分风格分解
comment: Project page: https://chuny1.github.io/NeRFEditor/nerfeditor.html
comments: Project page: https://chuny1.github.io/NeRFEditor/nerfeditor.html
abstract: We present NeRFEditor, an efficient learning framework for 3D scene editing, which takes a video captured over 360° as input and outputs a high-quality, identity-preserving stylized 3D scene. Our method supports diverse types of editing such as guided by reference images, text prompts, and user interactions. We achieve this by encouraging a pre-trained StyleGAN model and a NeRF model to learn from each other mutually. Specifically, we use a NeRF model to generate numerous image-angle pairs to train an adjustor, which can adjust the StyleGAN latent code to generate high-fidelity stylized images for any given angle. To extrapolate editing to GAN out-of-domain views, we devise another module that is trained in a self-supervised learning manner. This module maps novel-view images to the hidden space of StyleGAN that allows StyleGAN to generate stylized images on novel views. These two modules together produce guided images in 360°views to finetune a NeRF to make stylization effects, where a stable fine-tuning strategy is proposed to achieve this. Experiments show that NeRFEditor outperforms prior work on benchmark and real-world scenes with better editability, fidelity, and identity preservation.
summary: We present NeRFEditor, an efficient learning framework for 3D scene editing, which takes a video captured over 360° as input and outputs a high-quality, identity-preserving stylized 3D scene. Our method supports diverse types of editing such as guided by reference images, text prompts, and user interactions. We achieve this by encouraging a pre-trained StyleGAN model and a NeRF model to learn from each other mutually. Specifically, we use a NeRF model to generate numerous image-angle pairs to train an adjustor, which can adjust the StyleGAN latent code to generate high-fidelity stylized images for any given angle. To extrapolate editing to GAN out-of-domain views, we devise another module that is trained in a self-supervised learning manner. This module maps novel-view images to the hidden space of StyleGAN that allows StyleGAN to generate stylized images on novel views. These two modules together produce guided images in 360°views to finetune a NeRF to make stylization effects, where a stable fine-tuning strategy is proposed to achieve this. Experiments show that NeRFEditor outperforms prior work on benchmark and real-world scenes with better editability, fidelity, and identity preservation.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 NeRFEditor，这是一种用于 3D 场景编辑的高效学习框架，它将 360° 捕获的视频作为输入，并输出高质量、保留身份的风格化 3D 场景。我们的方法支持多种类型的编辑，例如参考图像、文本提示和用户交互的引导。我们通过鼓励预先训练的 StyleGAN 模型和 NeRF 模型相互学习来实现这一目标。具体来说，我们使用 NeRF 模型生成大量图像角度对来训练调整器，该调整器可以调整 StyleGAN 潜在代码以生成任何给定角度的高保真风格化图像。为了将编辑推断为 GAN 域外视图，我们设计了另一个以自我监督学习方式训练的模块。该模块将新颖视图图像映射到 StyleGAN 的隐藏空间，允许 StyleGAN 在新颖视图上生成风格化图像。这两个模块共同产生 360° 视图的引导图像，以微调 NeRF 来产生风格化效果，并提出了稳定的微调策略来实现这一目标。实验表明，NeRFEditor 在基准测试和现实场景中的表现优于之前的工作，具有更好的可编辑性、保真度和身份保留。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeRFEditor，一种基于不同风格分解的高效3D场景编辑框架，通过360°视频输入生成高质量且保持身份一致的风格化3D场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理参考图像、文本提示和用户交互等多样化编辑任务时存在局限性，且难以在GAN未见过的视角上进行风格化扩展。
AI.method: 通过预训练StyleGAN与NeRF模型的相互学习，利用NeRF生成图像-视角对训练调整器以优化StyleGAN潜码，并设计自监督模块将新视角映射到StyleGAN隐空间，结合稳定微调策略实现360°视角的风格化编辑。
AI.result: 在基准和真实场景中，NeRFEditor在可编辑性、保真度和身份保持方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过StyleGAN与NeRF的协同学习及自监督视角扩展模块，实现了高效且高质量的全视角3D场景风格化编辑。

search_text: NeRFEditor: Differentiable Style Decomposition for Full 3D Scene Editing NeRFEditor：用于全 3D 场景编辑的可微分风格分解 We present NeRFEditor, an efficient learning framework for 3D scene editing, which takes a video captured over 360° as input and outputs a high-quality, identity-preserving stylized 3D scene. Our method supports diverse types of editing such as guided by reference images, text prompts, and user interactions. We achieve this by encouraging a pre-trained StyleGAN model and a NeRF model to learn from each other mutually. Specifically, we use a NeRF model to generate numerous image-angle pairs to train an adjustor, which can adjust the StyleGAN latent code to generate high-fidelity stylized images for any given angle. To extrapolate editing to GAN out-of-domain views, we devise another module that is trained in a self-supervised learning manner. This module maps novel-view images to the hidden space of StyleGAN that allows StyleGAN to generate stylized images on novel views. These two modules together produce guided images in 360°views to finetune a NeRF to make stylization effects, where a stable fine-tuning strategy is proposed to achieve this. Experiments show that NeRFEditor outperforms prior work on benchmark and real-world scenes with better editability, fidelity, and identity preservation. 我们推出 NeRFEditor，这是一种用于 3D 场景编辑的高效学习框架，它将 360° 捕获的视频作为输入，并输出高质量、保留身份的风格化 3D 场景。我们的方法支持多种类型的编辑，例如参考图像、文本提示和用户交互的引导。我们通过鼓励预先训练的 StyleGAN 模型和 NeRF 模型相互学习来实现这一目标。具体来说，我们使用 NeRF 模型生成大量图像角度对来训练调整器，该调整器可以调整 StyleGAN 潜在代码以生成任何给定角度的高保真风格化图像。为了将编辑推断为 GAN 域外视图，我们设计了另一个以自我监督学习方式训练的模块。该模块将新颖视图图像映射到 StyleGAN 的隐藏空间，允许 StyleGAN 在新颖视图上生成风格化图像。这两个模块共同产生 360° 视图的引导图像，以微调 NeRF 来产生风格化效果，并提出了稳定的微调策略来实现这一目标。实验表明，NeRFEditor 在基准测试和现实场景中的表现优于之前的工作，具有更好的可编辑性、保真度和身份保留。 本文提出NeRFEditor，一种基于不同风格分解的高效3D场景编辑框架，通过360°视频输入生成高质量且保持身份一致的风格化3D场景。 Chunyi Sun,Yanbin Liu,Junlin Han,Stephen Gould cs.CV,cs.GR,eess.IV

authors_text: Abdulla Jasem Almansoori,Samuel Horváth,Martin Takáč
title: PaDPaF: Partial Disentanglement with Partially-Federated GANs
title_zh: PaDPaF：与部分联合 GAN 的部分分离
comment: 29 pages, 21 figures. Published at TMLR 04/2024
comments: 29 pages, 21 figures. Published at TMLR 04/2024
abstract: Federated learning has become a popular machine learning paradigm with many potential real-life applications, including recommendation systems, the Internet of Things (IoT), healthcare, and self-driving cars. Though most current applications focus on classification-based tasks, learning personalized generative models remains largely unexplored, and their benefits in the heterogeneous setting still need to be better understood. This work proposes a novel architecture combining global client-agnostic and local client-specific generative models. We show that using standard techniques for training federated models, our proposed model achieves privacy and personalization by implicitly disentangling the globally consistent representation (i.e. content) from the client-dependent variations (i.e. style). Using such decomposition, personalized models can generate locally unseen labels while preserving the given style of the client and can predict the labels for all clients with high accuracy by training a simple linear classifier on the global content features. Furthermore, disentanglement enables other essential applications, such as data anonymization, by sharing only the content. Extensive experimental evaluation corroborates our findings, and we also discuss a theoretical motivation for the proposed approach.
summary: Federated learning has become a popular machine learning paradigm with many potential real-life applications, including recommendation systems, the Internet of Things (IoT), healthcare, and self-driving cars. Though most current applications focus on classification-based tasks, learning personalized generative models remains largely unexplored, and their benefits in the heterogeneous setting still need to be better understood. This work proposes a novel architecture combining global client-agnostic and local client-specific generative models. We show that using standard techniques for training federated models, our proposed model achieves privacy and personalization by implicitly disentangling the globally consistent representation (i.e. content) from the client-dependent variations (i.e. style). Using such decomposition, personalized models can generate locally unseen labels while preserving the given style of the client and can predict the labels for all clients with high accuracy by training a simple linear classifier on the global content features. Furthermore, disentanglement enables other essential applications, such as data anonymization, by sharing only the content. Extensive experimental evaluation corroborates our findings, and we also discuss a theoretical motivation for the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习已成为一种流行的机器学习范例，具有许多潜在的现实应用，包括推荐系统、物联网 (IoT)、医疗保健和自动驾驶汽车。尽管当前大多数应用程序都专注于基于分类的任务，但学习个性化生成模型在很大程度上仍未得到探索，并且仍需要更好地理解它们在异构环境中的好处。这项工作提出了一种新颖的架构，结合了与全局客户无关的生成模型和本地客户特定的生成模型。我们表明，使用标准技术来训练联合模型，我们提出的模型通过隐式地将全局一致的表示（即内容）与依赖于客户端的变化（即风格）分开来实现隐私和个性化。使用这种分解，个性化模型可以生成本地看不见的标签，同时保留客户端的给定风格，并且可以通过在全局内容特征上训练简单的线性分类器来高精度地预测所有客户端的标签。此外，解开可以通过仅共享内容来实现其他基本应用，例如数据匿名化。广泛的实验评估证实了我们的发现，我们还讨论了所提出方法的理论动机。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合全局和本地生成模型的联邦学习框架，通过隐式解耦内容与风格，实现隐私保护与个性化生成。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习主要针对分类任务，个性化生成模型研究不足，需在隐私保护下实现跨客户端个性化生成。
AI.method: 结合全局与本地生成模型，隐式解耦内容（全局一致）与风格（客户端依赖），利用联邦训练技术实现隐私保护与个性化生成，并通过线性分类器提升标签预测准确率。
AI.result: 实验验证了模型在生成未见标签、保持风格、高准确率预测及数据匿名化中的有效性，理论分析支持方法合理性。
AI.conclusion: PaDPaF通过解耦机制在联邦学习中有效平衡隐私与个性化，为异构环境下的生成模型提供新思路，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Jiajun Chai,Wenzhang Chen,Yuanheng Zhu,Zong-xin Yao,Dongbin Zhao
title: A Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for 6-DOF UCAV Air-to-Air Combat
title_zh: 六自由度无人作战飞机空对空作战的分层深度强化学习框架
abstract: Unmanned combat air vehicle (UCAV) combat is a challenging scenario with continuous action space. In this paper, we propose a general hierarchical framework to resolve the within-vision-range (WVR) air-to-air combat problem under 6 dimensions of degree (6-DOF) dynamics. The core idea is to divide the whole decision process into two loops and use reinforcement learning (RL) to solve them separately. The outer loop takes into account the current combat situation and decides the expected macro behavior of the aircraft according to a combat strategy. Then the inner loop tracks the macro behavior with a flight controller by calculating the actual input signals for the aircraft. We design the Markov decision process for both the outer loop strategy and inner loop controller, and train them by proximal policy optimization (PPO) algorithm. For the inner loop controller, we design an effective reward function to accurately track various macro behavior. For the outer loop strategy, we further adopt a fictitious self-play mechanism to improve the combat performance by constantly combating against the historical strategies. Experiment results show that the inner loop controller can achieve better tracking performance than fine-tuned PID controller, and the outer loop strategy can perform complex maneuvers to get higher and higher winning rate, with the generation evolves.
summary: Unmanned combat air vehicle (UCAV) combat is a challenging scenario with continuous action space. In this paper, we propose a general hierarchical framework to resolve the within-vision-range (WVR) air-to-air combat problem under 6 dimensions of degree (6-DOF) dynamics. The core idea is to divide the whole decision process into two loops and use reinforcement learning (RL) to solve them separately. The outer loop takes into account the current combat situation and decides the expected macro behavior of the aircraft according to a combat strategy. Then the inner loop tracks the macro behavior with a flight controller by calculating the actual input signals for the aircraft. We design the Markov decision process for both the outer loop strategy and inner loop controller, and train them by proximal policy optimization (PPO) algorithm. For the inner loop controller, we design an effective reward function to accurately track various macro behavior. For the outer loop strategy, we further adopt a fictitious self-play mechanism to improve the combat performance by constantly combating against the historical strategies. Experiment results show that the inner loop controller can achieve better tracking performance than fine-tuned PID controller, and the outer loop strategy can perform complex maneuvers to get higher and higher winning rate, with the generation evolves.
abstract_zh: 无人作战飞机（UCAV）的战斗是一个具有连续行动空间的具有挑战性的场景。在本文中，我们提出了一个通用的层次框架来解决6个维度（6-DOF）动力学下的视距内（WVR）空对空作战问题。核心思想是将整个决策过程分为两个循环，利用强化学习（RL）分别解决。外环考虑当前的战斗情况，并根据战斗策略决定飞机的预期宏观行为。然后，内循环通过计算飞机的实际输入信号来跟踪飞行控制器的宏观行为。我们为外环策略和内环控制器设计了马尔可夫决策过程，并通过近端策略优化（PPO）算法对其进行训练。对于内环控制器，我们设计了有效的奖励函数来准确跟踪各种宏观行为。对于外循环策略，我们进一步采用虚拟的自我对战机制，通过不断对抗历史策略来提高战斗性能。实验结果表明，随着世代的进化，内环控制器可以比微调PID控制器获得更好的跟踪性能，外环策略可以执行复杂的动作以获得越来越高的获胜率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层深度强化学习框架，用于解决六自由度（6-DOF）无人作战飞机（UCAV）近距空战问题。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法（如PID）难以应对空战中连续动作空间和复杂动态的挑战，需设计更智能的分层决策框架以提升作战性能。
AI.method: 将决策过程分为外层策略环和内层控制环：外层基于马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）和虚构自博弈机制优化战术策略，内层通过PPO算法和定制奖励函数实现精确轨迹跟踪。
AI.result: 内层控制器跟踪性能优于调优后的PID控制器，外层策略通过进化生成复杂机动动作，最终胜率随迭代显著提升。

search_text: A Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for 6-DOF UCAV Air-to-Air Combat 六自由度无人作战飞机空对空作战的分层深度强化学习框架 Unmanned combat air vehicle (UCAV) combat is a challenging scenario with continuous action space. In this paper, we propose a general hierarchical framework to resolve the within-vision-range (WVR) air-to-air combat problem under 6 dimensions of degree (6-DOF) dynamics. The core idea is to divide the whole decision process into two loops and use reinforcement learning (RL) to solve them separately. The outer loop takes into account the current combat situation and decides the expected macro behavior of the aircraft according to a combat strategy. Then the inner loop tracks the macro behavior with a flight controller by calculating the actual input signals for the aircraft. We design the Markov decision process for both the outer loop strategy and inner loop controller, and train them by proximal policy optimization (PPO) algorithm. For the inner loop controller, we design an effective reward function to accurately track various macro behavior. For the outer loop strategy, we further adopt a fictitious self-play mechanism to improve the combat performance by constantly combating against the historical strategies. Experiment results show that the inner loop controller can achieve better tracking performance than fine-tuned PID controller, and the outer loop strategy can perform complex maneuvers to get higher and higher winning rate, with the generation evolves. 无人作战飞机（UCAV）的战斗是一个具有连续行动空间的具有挑战性的场景。在本文中，我们提出了一个通用的层次框架来解决6个维度（6-DOF）动力学下的视距内（WVR）空对空作战问题。核心思想是将整个决策过程分为两个循环，利用强化学习（RL）分别解决。外环考虑当前的战斗情况，并根据战斗策略决定飞机的预期宏观行为。然后，内循环通过计算飞机的实际输入信号来跟踪飞行控制器的宏观行为。我们为外环策略和内环控制器设计了马尔可夫决策过程，并通过近端策略优化（PPO）算法对其进行训练。对于内环控制器，我们设计了有效的奖励函数来准确跟踪各种宏观行为。对于外循环策略，我们进一步采用虚拟的自我对战机制，通过不断对抗历史策略来提高战斗性能。实验结果表明，随着世代的进化，内环控制器可以比微调PID控制器获得更好的跟踪性能，外环策略可以执行复杂的动作以获得越来越高的获胜率。 本文提出一种分层深度强化学习框架，用于解决六自由度（6-DOF）无人作战飞机（UCAV）近距空战问题。 Jiajun Chai,Wenzhang Chen,Yuanheng Zhu,Zong-xin Yao,Dongbin Zhao cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Cristian Millán-Arias,Ruben Contreras,Francisco Cruz,Bruno Fernandes
title: Reinforcement Learning for UAV control with Policy and Reward Shaping
title_zh: 通过策略和奖励塑造进行无人机控制的强化学习
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures, Preprint accepted at the 41st International Conference of the Chilean Computer Science Society, SCCC 2022, Santiago, Chile, 2022
comments: 9 pages, 9 figures, Preprint accepted at the 41st International Conference of the Chilean Computer Science Society, SCCC 2022, Santiago, Chile, 2022
abstract: In recent years, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) related technology has expanded knowledge in the area, bringing to light new problems and challenges that require solutions. Furthermore, because the technology allows processes usually carried out by people to be automated, it is in great demand in industrial sectors. The automation of these vehicles has been addressed in the literature, applying different machine learning strategies. Reinforcement learning (RL) is an automation framework that is frequently used to train autonomous agents. RL is a machine learning paradigm wherein an agent interacts with an environment to solve a given task. However, learning autonomously can be time consuming, computationally expensive, and may not be practical in highly-complex scenarios. Interactive reinforcement learning allows an external trainer to provide advice to an agent while it is learning a task. In this study, we set out to teach an RL agent to control a drone using reward-shaping and policy-shaping techniques simultaneously. Two simulated scenarios were proposed for the training; one without obstacles and one with obstacles. We also studied the influence of each technique. The results show that an agent trained simultaneously with both techniques obtains a lower reward than an agent trained using only a policy-based approach. Nevertheless, the agent achieves lower execution times and less dispersion during training.

abstract_zh: 近年来，无人机（UAV）相关技术扩展了该领域的知识，带来了需要解决的新问题和挑战。此外，由于该技术可以实现通常由人执行的流程自动化，因此工业领域对它的需求很大。文献中已经讨论了这些车辆的自动化，应用了不同的机器学习策略。强化学习 (RL) 是一种自动化框架，经常用于训练自主代理。强化学习是一种机器学习范例，其中代理与环境交互以解决给定的任务。然而，自主学习可能非常耗时、计算成本高昂，并且在高度复杂的场景中可能不切实际。交互式强化学习允许外部培训师在代理学习任务时向其提供建议。在这项研究中，我们开始教 RL 代理同时使用奖励塑造和策略塑造技术来控制无人机。为培训提出了两种模拟场景；一种是没有障碍的，一种是有障碍的。我们还研究了每种技术的影响。结果表明，同时使用两种技术训练的智能体获得的奖励低于仅使用基于策略的方法训练的智能体。尽管如此，代理在训练期间实现了更短的执行时间和更少的分散。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过同时使用奖励塑造和策略塑造技术，训练强化学习代理控制无人机，并在有无障碍物的场景中进行测试。
AI.motivation: 无人机自动化需求增加，但传统强化学习训练耗时且成本高。通过结合奖励塑造和策略塑造技术，可提升训练效率并解决复杂场景下的控制问题。
AI.method: 设计两种模拟场景（无障碍和有障碍），同时应用奖励塑造与策略塑造技术训练RL代理，并分析两种技术对训练效果的影响。
AI.result: 联合使用两种技术的代理奖励低于仅策略方法，但训练执行时间更短且训练过程更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 联合技术虽降低奖励值，但显著提升训练效率和稳定性，为无人机控制提供可行方案。

authors_text: Collin Burns,Haotian Ye,Dan Klein,Jacob Steinhardt
title: Discovering Latent Knowledge in Language Models Without Supervision
title_zh: 在没有监督的情况下发现语言模型中的潜在知识
comment: ICLR 2023
comments: ICLR 2023
abstract: Existing techniques for training language models can be misaligned with the truth: if we train models with imitation learning, they may reproduce errors that humans make; if we train them to generate text that humans rate highly, they may output errors that human evaluators can't detect. We propose circumventing this issue by directly finding latent knowledge inside the internal activations of a language model in a purely unsupervised way. Specifically, we introduce a method for accurately answering yes-no questions given only unlabeled model activations. It works by finding a direction in activation space that satisfies logical consistency properties, such as that a statement and its negation have opposite truth values. We show that despite using no supervision and no model outputs, our method can recover diverse knowledge represented in large language models: across 6 models and 10 question-answering datasets, it outperforms zero-shot accuracy by 4\% on average. We also find that it cuts prompt sensitivity in half and continues to maintain high accuracy even when models are prompted to generate incorrect answers. Our results provide an initial step toward discovering what language models know, distinct from what they say, even when we don't have access to explicit ground truth labels.
summary: Existing techniques for training language models can be misaligned with the truth: if we train models with imitation learning, they may reproduce errors that humans make; if we train them to generate text that humans rate highly, they may output errors that human evaluators can't detect. We propose circumventing this issue by directly finding latent knowledge inside the internal activations of a language model in a purely unsupervised way. Specifically, we introduce a method for accurately answering yes-no questions given only unlabeled model activations. It works by finding a direction in activation space that satisfies logical consistency properties, such as that a statement and its negation have opposite truth values. We show that despite using no supervision and no model outputs, our method can recover diverse knowledge represented in large language models: across 6 models and 10 question-answering datasets, it outperforms zero-shot accuracy by 4\% on average. We also find that it cuts prompt sensitivity in half and continues to maintain high accuracy even when models are prompted to generate incorrect answers. Our results provide an initial step toward discovering what language models know, distinct from what they say, even when we don't have access to explicit ground truth labels.
abstract_zh: 现有的语言模型训练技术可能与事实不符：如果我们通过模仿学习来训练模型，它们可能会重现人类所犯的错误；如果我们训练它们生成人类评价较高的文本，它们可能会输出人类评估者无法检测到的错误。我们建议通过以纯粹无监督的方式直接寻找语言模型内部激活中的潜在知识来规避这个问题。具体来说，我们引入了一种仅在未标记的模型激活的情况下准确回答是/否问题的方法。它的工作原理是在激活空间中找到满足逻辑一致性属性的方向，例如语句及其否定具有相反的真值。我们表明，尽管不使用监督和模型输出，我们的方法仍然可以恢复大型语言模型中表示的多样化知识：在 6 个模型和 10 个问答数据集上，它的平均准确率比零样本准确率高 4%。我们还发现，即使提示模型生成错误答案，它也能将提示灵敏度降低一半并继续保持高精度。我们的结果为发现语言模型所知道的内容（不同于它们所说的内容）迈出了第一步，即使我们无法访问明确的地面实况标签。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督即可从语言模型内部激活状态中发现潜在知识的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型训练方法可能与真实知识存在偏差，例如模仿学习会复制人类错误，而基于人类评分的训练可能生成人类难以察觉的错误。
AI.method: 通过分析模型内部激活状态，在激活空间中寻找满足逻辑一致性（如命题与其否定值相反）的方向，从而回答二分类问题。
AI.result: 在6个模型和10个问答数据集上，该方法平均超越零样本准确率4%，且减少一半的提示敏感性，并在模型被引导生成错误答案时仍保持高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在无监督条件下揭示语言模型真实知识提供了新途径，突破了传统依赖显式标注或模型输出的限制。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督即可从语言模型内部激活状态中发现潜在知识的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 现有语言模型训练方法可能与真实知识存在偏差，例如模仿学习会复制人类错误，而基于人类评分的训练可能生成人类难以察觉的错误。

ai_content.result: 在6个模型和10个问答数据集上，该方法平均超越零样本准确率4%，且减少一半的提示敏感性，并在模型被引导生成错误答案时仍保持高准确率。

search_text: Discovering Latent Knowledge in Language Models Without Supervision 在没有监督的情况下发现语言模型中的潜在知识 Existing techniques for training language models can be misaligned with the truth: if we train models with imitation learning, they may reproduce errors that humans make; if we train them to generate text that humans rate highly, they may output errors that human evaluators can't detect. We propose circumventing this issue by directly finding latent knowledge inside the internal activations of a language model in a purely unsupervised way. Specifically, we introduce a method for accurately answering yes-no questions given only unlabeled model activations. It works by finding a direction in activation space that satisfies logical consistency properties, such as that a statement and its negation have opposite truth values. We show that despite using no supervision and no model outputs, our method can recover diverse knowledge represented in large language models: across 6 models and 10 question-answering datasets, it outperforms zero-shot accuracy by 4\% on average. We also find that it cuts prompt sensitivity in half and continues to maintain high accuracy even when models are prompted to generate incorrect answers. Our results provide an initial step toward discovering what language models know, distinct from what they say, even when we don't have access to explicit ground truth labels. 现有的语言模型训练技术可能与事实不符：如果我们通过模仿学习来训练模型，它们可能会重现人类所犯的错误；如果我们训练它们生成人类评价较高的文本，它们可能会输出人类评估者无法检测到的错误。我们建议通过以纯粹无监督的方式直接寻找语言模型内部激活中的潜在知识来规避这个问题。具体来说，我们引入了一种仅在未标记的模型激活的情况下准确回答是/否问题的方法。它的工作原理是在激活空间中找到满足逻辑一致性属性的方向，例如语句及其否定具有相反的真值。我们表明，尽管不使用监督和模型输出，我们的方法仍然可以恢复大型语言模型中表示的多样化知识：在 6 个模型和 10 个问答数据集上，它的平均准确率比零样本准确率高 4%。我们还发现，即使提示模型生成错误答案，它也能将提示灵敏度降低一半并继续保持高精度。我们的结果为发现语言模型所知道的内容（不同于它们所说的内容）迈出了第一步，即使我们无法访问明确的地面实况标签。 本文提出了一种无需监督即可从语言模型内部激活状态中发现潜在知识的方法。 Collin Burns,Haotian Ye,Dan Klein,Jacob Steinhardt cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sarmad F. Ismael,Koray Kayabol,Erchan Aptoula
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation using One-shot Image-to-Image Translation via Latent Representation Mixing
title_zh: 通过潜在表示混合使用一次性图像到图像转换进行语义分割的无监督域适应
abstract: Domain adaptation is one of the prominent strategies for handling both domain shift, that is widely encountered in large-scale land use/land cover map calculation, and the scarcity of pixel-level ground truth that is crucial for supervised semantic segmentation. Studies focusing on adversarial domain adaptation via re-styling source domain samples, commonly through generative adversarial networks, have reported varying levels of success, yet they suffer from semantic inconsistencies, visual corruptions, and often require a large number of target domain samples. In this letter, we propose a new unsupervised domain adaptation method for the semantic segmentation of very high resolution images, that i) leads to semantically consistent and noise-free images, ii) operates with a single target domain sample (i.e. one-shot) and iii) at a fraction of the number of parameters required from state-of-the-art methods. More specifically an image-to-image translation paradigm is proposed, based on an encoder-decoder principle where latent content representations are mixed across domains, and a perceptual network module and loss function is further introduced to enforce semantic consistency. Cross-city comparative experiments have shown that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods. Our source code will be available at \url{https://github.com/Sarmadfismael/LRM_I2I}.
summary: Domain adaptation is one of the prominent strategies for handling both domain shift, that is widely encountered in large-scale land use/land cover map calculation, and the scarcity of pixel-level ground truth that is crucial for supervised semantic segmentation. Studies focusing on adversarial domain adaptation via re-styling source domain samples, commonly through generative adversarial networks, have reported varying levels of success, yet they suffer from semantic inconsistencies, visual corruptions, and often require a large number of target domain samples. In this letter, we propose a new unsupervised domain adaptation method for the semantic segmentation of very high resolution images, that i) leads to semantically consistent and noise-free images, ii) operates with a single target domain sample (i.e. one-shot) and iii) at a fraction of the number of parameters required from state-of-the-art methods. More specifically an image-to-image translation paradigm is proposed, based on an encoder-decoder principle where latent content representations are mixed across domains, and a perceptual network module and loss function is further introduced to enforce semantic consistency. Cross-city comparative experiments have shown that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods. Our source code will be available at \url{https://github.com/Sarmadfismael/LRM_I2I}.
abstract_zh: 域适应是处理域转移的重要策略之一，这在大规模土地利用/土地覆盖图计算中广泛遇到，并且像素级地面实况的稀缺对于监督语义分割至关重要。通过重新设计源域样本（通常通过生成对抗网络）来关注对抗性域适应的研究已经报告了不同程度的成功，但它们存在语义不一致、视觉损坏的问题，并且通常需要大量目标域样本。在这封信中，我们提出了一种新的无监督域适应方法，用于极高分辨率图像的语义分割，i）产生语义一致且无噪声的图像，ii）使用单个目标域样本（即一次性）进行操作，以及 iii）仅使用最先进方法所需参数数量的一小部分。更具体地说，基于编码器-解码器原理，提出了图像到图像的翻译范例，其中潜在内容表示跨域混合，并进一步引入感知网络模块和损失函数以强制语义一致性。跨城市比较实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的域适应方法。我们的源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Sarmadfismael/LRM_I2I} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督领域自适应方法，通过潜在表示混合和单样本图像翻译解决高分辨率图像语义分割中的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗领域自适应方法存在语义不一致、视觉损坏及依赖大量目标域样本的问题，而实际应用中目标域标注数据稀缺且领域差异显著。
AI.method: 基于编码器-解码器框架，通过跨领域潜在表示混合实现图像翻译，并引入感知网络模块及损失函数确保语义一致性，仅需单个目标域样本即可训练。
AI.result: 跨城市对比实验表明，该方法在参数量仅为现有方法几分之一的情况下，性能优于当前最先进的领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的单样本潜在混合方法有效解决了领域偏移与标注稀缺矛盾，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度。

authors_text: Wei Shen,Xiaonan He,Chuheng Zhang,Xuyun Zhang,Jian XIe
title: A Transformer-Based User Satisfaction Prediction for Proactive Interaction Mechanism in DuerOS
title_zh: DuerOS中基于Transformer的主动交互机制用户满意度预测
comment: Accepted by CIKM-22
comments: Accepted by CIKM-22
abstract: Recently, spoken dialogue systems have been widely deployed in a variety of applications, serving a huge number of end-users. A common issue is that the errors resulting from noisy utterances, semantic misunderstandings, or lack of knowledge make it hard for a real system to respond properly, possibly leading to an unsatisfactory user experience. To avoid such a case, we consider a proactive interaction mechanism where the system predicts the user satisfaction with the candidate response before giving it to the user. If the user is not likely to be satisfied according to the prediction, the system will ask the user a suitable question to determine the real intent of the user instead of providing the response directly. With such an interaction with the user, the system can give a better response to the user. Previous models that predict the user satisfaction are not applicable to DuerOS which is a large-scale commercial dialogue system. They are based on hand-crafted features and thus can hardly learn the complex patterns lying behind millions of conversations and temporal dependency in multiple turns of the conversation. Moreover, they are trained and evaluated on the benchmark datasets with adequate labels, which are expensive to obtain in a commercial dialogue system. To face these challenges, we propose a pipeline to predict the user satisfaction to help DuerOS decide whether to ask for clarification in each turn. Specifically, we propose to first generate a large number of weak labels and then train a transformer-based model to predict the user satisfaction with these weak labels. Empirically, we deploy and evaluate our model on DuerOS, and observe a 19% relative improvement on the accuracy of user satisfaction prediction and 2.3% relative improvement on user experience.
summary: Recently, spoken dialogue systems have been widely deployed in a variety of applications, serving a huge number of end-users. A common issue is that the errors resulting from noisy utterances, semantic misunderstandings, or lack of knowledge make it hard for a real system to respond properly, possibly leading to an unsatisfactory user experience. To avoid such a case, we consider a proactive interaction mechanism where the system predicts the user satisfaction with the candidate response before giving it to the user. If the user is not likely to be satisfied according to the prediction, the system will ask the user a suitable question to determine the real intent of the user instead of providing the response directly. With such an interaction with the user, the system can give a better response to the user. Previous models that predict the user satisfaction are not applicable to DuerOS which is a large-scale commercial dialogue system. They are based on hand-crafted features and thus can hardly learn the complex patterns lying behind millions of conversations and temporal dependency in multiple turns of the conversation. Moreover, they are trained and evaluated on the benchmark datasets with adequate labels, which are expensive to obtain in a commercial dialogue system. To face these challenges, we propose a pipeline to predict the user satisfaction to help DuerOS decide whether to ask for clarification in each turn. Specifically, we propose to first generate a large number of weak labels and then train a transformer-based model to predict the user satisfaction with these weak labels. Empirically, we deploy and evaluate our model on DuerOS, and observe a 19% relative improvement on the accuracy of user satisfaction prediction and 2.3% relative improvement on user experience.
abstract_zh: 近年来，语音对话系统已广泛部署在各种应用中，为大量的最终用户提供服务。一个常见的问题是，由于嘈杂的话语、语义误解或缺乏知识而导致的错误使真实系统难以正确响应，可能导致用户体验不佳。为了避免这种情况，我们考虑一种主动交互机制，系统在将候选响应提供给用户之前预测用户对候选响应的满意度。如果根据预测用户不太可能满意，系统将询问用户一个合适的问题来确定用户的真实意图，而不是直接提供响应。通过这样与用户的交互，系统可以给用户更好的响应。以往预测用户满意度的模型不适用于DuerOS这种大型商业对话系统。它们基于手工制作的特征，因此很难学习数百万个对话背后的复杂模式以及多轮对话中的时间依赖性。此外，它们是在具有足够标签的基准数据集上进行训练和评估的，而在商业对话系统中获得这些标签的成本很高。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个预测用户满意度的管道，以帮助 DuerOS 决定是否每次都要求澄清。具体来说，我们建议首先生成大量弱标签，然后训练基于变压器的模型来预测用户对这些弱标签的满意度。根据经验，我们在 DuerOS 上部署和评估我们的模型，观察到用户满意度预测的准确性相对提高了 19%，用户体验相对提高了 2.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的用户满意度预测方法，用于DuerOS对话系统中的主动交互机制，通过预测用户满意度决定是否主动询问澄清问题以提升用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有用户满意度预测模型依赖人工特征且难以处理大规模对话中的复杂模式和多轮依赖，同时商业系统中高质量标注数据获取成本高。
AI.method: 通过生成弱标签训练Transformer模型预测用户满意度，利用预测结果决定是否主动询问用户澄清问题，从而优化对话响应策略。
AI.result: 在DuerOS系统中部署后，用户满意度预测准确率提升19%，用户体验指标提升2.3%。
AI.conclusion: 基于弱标签的Transformer模型有效解决了商业对话系统中用户满意度预测的挑战，显著提升了系统交互质量和用户体验。

search_text: A Transformer-Based User Satisfaction Prediction for Proactive Interaction Mechanism in DuerOS DuerOS中基于Transformer的主动交互机制用户满意度预测 Recently, spoken dialogue systems have been widely deployed in a variety of applications, serving a huge number of end-users. A common issue is that the errors resulting from noisy utterances, semantic misunderstandings, or lack of knowledge make it hard for a real system to respond properly, possibly leading to an unsatisfactory user experience. To avoid such a case, we consider a proactive interaction mechanism where the system predicts the user satisfaction with the candidate response before giving it to the user. If the user is not likely to be satisfied according to the prediction, the system will ask the user a suitable question to determine the real intent of the user instead of providing the response directly. With such an interaction with the user, the system can give a better response to the user. Previous models that predict the user satisfaction are not applicable to DuerOS which is a large-scale commercial dialogue system. They are based on hand-crafted features and thus can hardly learn the complex patterns lying behind millions of conversations and temporal dependency in multiple turns of the conversation. Moreover, they are trained and evaluated on the benchmark datasets with adequate labels, which are expensive to obtain in a commercial dialogue system. To face these challenges, we propose a pipeline to predict the user satisfaction to help DuerOS decide whether to ask for clarification in each turn. Specifically, we propose to first generate a large number of weak labels and then train a transformer-based model to predict the user satisfaction with these weak labels. Empirically, we deploy and evaluate our model on DuerOS, and observe a 19% relative improvement on the accuracy of user satisfaction prediction and 2.3% relative improvement on user experience. 近年来，语音对话系统已广泛部署在各种应用中，为大量的最终用户提供服务。一个常见的问题是，由于嘈杂的话语、语义误解或缺乏知识而导致的错误使真实系统难以正确响应，可能导致用户体验不佳。为了避免这种情况，我们考虑一种主动交互机制，系统在将候选响应提供给用户之前预测用户对候选响应的满意度。如果根据预测用户不太可能满意，系统将询问用户一个合适的问题来确定用户的真实意图，而不是直接提供响应。通过这样与用户的交互，系统可以给用户更好的响应。以往预测用户满意度的模型不适用于DuerOS这种大型商业对话系统。它们基于手工制作的特征，因此很难学习数百万个对话背后的复杂模式以及多轮对话中的时间依赖性。此外，它们是在具有足够标签的基准数据集上进行训练和评估的，而在商业对话系统中获得这些标签的成本很高。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个预测用户满意度的管道，以帮助 DuerOS 决定是否每次都要求澄清。具体来说，我们建议首先生成大量弱标签，然后训练基于变压器的模型来预测用户对这些弱标签的满意度。根据经验，我们在 DuerOS 上部署和评估我们的模型，观察到用户满意度预测的准确性相对提高了 19%，用户体验相对提高了 2.3%。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的用户满意度预测方法，用于DuerOS对话系统中的主动交互机制，通过预测用户满意度决定是否主动询问澄清问题以提升用户体验。 Wei Shen,Xiaonan He,Chuheng Zhang,Xuyun Zhang,Jian XIe cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jiaben Chen,Renrui Zhang,Dongze Lian,Jiaqi Yang,Ziyao Zeng,Jianbo Shi
title: iQuery: Instruments as Queries for Audio-Visual Sound Separation
title_zh: iQuery：作为视听声音分离查询的乐器
abstract: Current audio-visual separation methods share a standard architecture design where an audio encoder-decoder network is fused with visual encoding features at the encoder bottleneck. This design confounds the learning of multi-modal feature encoding with robust sound decoding for audio separation. To generalize to a new instrument: one must finetune the entire visual and audio network for all musical instruments. We re-formulate visual-sound separation task and propose Instrument as Query (iQuery) with a flexible query expansion mechanism. Our approach ensures cross-modal consistency and cross-instrument disentanglement. We utilize "visually named" queries to initiate the learning of audio queries and use cross-modal attention to remove potential sound source interference at the estimated waveforms. To generalize to a new instrument or event class, drawing inspiration from the text-prompt design, we insert an additional query as an audio prompt while freezing the attention mechanism. Experimental results on three benchmarks demonstrate that our iQuery improves audio-visual sound source separation performance.
summary: Current audio-visual separation methods share a standard architecture design where an audio encoder-decoder network is fused with visual encoding features at the encoder bottleneck. This design confounds the learning of multi-modal feature encoding with robust sound decoding for audio separation. To generalize to a new instrument: one must finetune the entire visual and audio network for all musical instruments. We re-formulate visual-sound separation task and propose Instrument as Query (iQuery) with a flexible query expansion mechanism. Our approach ensures cross-modal consistency and cross-instrument disentanglement. We utilize "visually named" queries to initiate the learning of audio queries and use cross-modal attention to remove potential sound source interference at the estimated waveforms. To generalize to a new instrument or event class, drawing inspiration from the text-prompt design, we insert an additional query as an audio prompt while freezing the attention mechanism. Experimental results on three benchmarks demonstrate that our iQuery improves audio-visual sound source separation performance.
abstract_zh: 当前的视听分离方法共享标准架构设计，其中音频编码器-解码器网络在编码器瓶颈处与视觉编码特征融合。这种设计混淆了多模态特征编码的学习和用于音频分离的鲁棒声音解码。为了推广到一种新乐器：必须微调所有乐器的整个视觉和音频网络。我们重新制定了视声分离任务，并提出了具有灵活查询扩展机制的仪器即查询（iQuery）。我们的方法确保跨模式一致性和跨仪器解耦。我们利用“视觉命名”查询来启动音频查询的学习，并使用跨模式注意来消除估计波形上潜在的声源干扰。为了推广到新的乐器或事件类，从文本提示设计中汲取灵感，我们插入一个额外的查询作为音频提示，同时冻结注意力机制。三个基准测试的实验结果表明，我们的 iQuery 提高了视听声源分离性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iQuery方法，通过将乐器作为查询，改进音频-视觉声源分离任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需微调整个网络适应新乐器，且多模态特征编码与声音解码学习存在冲突，限制了模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计灵活查询扩展机制，利用视觉命名查询引导音频学习，结合跨模态注意力消除干扰，并通过冻结注意力机制插入音频提示实现新乐器泛化。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中，iQuery显著提升了音频-视觉声源分离性能。
AI.conclusion: iQuery通过解耦跨模态一致性与乐器特性，有效提高了声源分离效果及模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Spandan Dey,Md Sahidullah,Goutam Saha
title: An Overview of Indian Spoken Language Recognition from Machine Learning Perspective
title_zh: 从机器学习的角度看印度口语识别概述
comment: Accepted for publication in ACM Transactions on Asian and Low-Resource Language Information Processing
comments: Accepted for publication in ACM Transactions on Asian and Low-Resource Language Information Processing
abstract: Automatic spoken language identification (LID) is a very important research field in the era of multilingual voice-command-based human-computer interaction (HCI). A front-end LID module helps to improve the performance of many speech-based applications in the multilingual scenario. India is a populous country with diverse cultures and languages. The majority of the Indian population needs to use their respective native languages for verbal interaction with machines. Therefore, the development of efficient Indian spoken language recognition systems is useful for adapting smart technologies in every section of Indian society. The field of Indian LID has started gaining momentum in the last two decades, mainly due to the development of several standard multilingual speech corpora for the Indian languages. Even though significant research progress has already been made in this field, to the best of our knowledge, there are not many attempts to analytically review them collectively. In this work, we have conducted one of the very first attempts to present a comprehensive review of the Indian spoken language recognition research field. In-depth analysis has been presented to emphasize the unique challenges of low-resource and mutual influences for developing LID systems in the Indian contexts. Several essential aspects of the Indian LID research, such as the detailed description of the available speech corpora, the major research contributions, including the earlier attempts based on statistical modeling to the recent approaches based on different neural network architectures, and the future research trends are discussed. This review work will help assess the state of the present Indian LID research by any active researcher or any research enthusiasts from related fields.
summary: Automatic spoken language identification (LID) is a very important research field in the era of multilingual voice-command-based human-computer interaction (HCI). A front-end LID module helps to improve the performance of many speech-based applications in the multilingual scenario. India is a populous country with diverse cultures and languages. Therefore, the development of efficient Indian spoken language recognition systems is useful for adapting smart technologies in every section of Indian society. Even though significant research progress has already been made in this field, to the best of our knowledge, there are not many attempts to analytically review them collectively. In this work, we have conducted one of the very first attempts to present a comprehensive review of the Indian spoken language recognition research field. In-depth analysis has been presented to emphasize the unique challenges of low-resource and mutual influences for developing LID systems in the Indian contexts. Several essential aspects of the Indian LID research, such as the detailed description of the available speech corpora, the major research contributions, including the earlier attempts based on statistical modeling to the recent approaches based on different neural network architectures, and the future research trends are discussed. This review work will help assess the state of the present Indian LID research by any active researcher or any research enthusiasts from related fields.
abstract_zh: 自动口语识别（LID）是基于多语言语音命令的人机交互（HCI）时代一个非常重要的研究领域。前端 LID 模块有助于提高多语言场景中许多基于语音的应用程序的性能。印度是一个人口大国，拥有多元化的文化和语言。大多数印度人口需要使用各自的母语与机器进行口头交互。因此，开发高效的印度口语识别系统有助于将智能技术应用于印度社会的各个领域。印度 LID 领域在过去二十年中开始蓬勃发展，这主要是由于印度语言的几种标准多语言语音语料库的开发。尽管该领域已经取得了重大研究进展，但据我们所知，对它们进行集体分析审查的尝试并不多。在这项工作中，我们首次尝试对印度口语识别研究领域进行全面回顾。深入分析强调了印度背景下开发 LID 系统所面临的资源匮乏和相互影响的独特挑战。讨论了印度 LID 研究的几个重要方面，例如可用语音语料库的详细描述、主要研究贡献，包括基于统计建模的早期尝试到基于不同神经网络架构的最新方法，以及未来的研究趋势。这项审查工作将有助于评估任何活跃的研究人员或相关领域的研究爱好者目前印度 LID 研究的状况。

AI.tldr: 本文从机器学习角度综述了印度口语语言识别的研究现状与挑战。
AI.motivation: 印度作为多语言国家需要高效的本地语言识别系统以适应智能技术应用，但现有研究缺乏系统性分析。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析印度LID研究的可用语料库、主要技术贡献（从统计模型到神经网络）及低资源语言等独特挑战。
AI.result: 梳理了印度LID领域的发展脉络，总结了现有技术路线与数据资源，并指出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为研究人员提供了印度LID领域的全面参考，强调了低资源语言处理和跨语言干扰问题的重要性。
